name: John Kasich
subject: Four years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
It's hard to believe that it has been four years since my participation in New Hampshire’s presidential primary. [ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=8e9f8f7167914c8ea93fe87956ab8dee&_e=Bf75tH1xiYzmrn4LTzKiJJcImlm9WJZ7Xrzzw7nBfLTIC_s7WkDZIH4uivZUXwvQpH2A6scXUq5Gt8Kaa4YuCa26p6PtkmMHbD1WYiw4kdAxvMWiJ8VjAiypuupAdK1YPv7Y6_JrUfBdnQNqLkVMYV4Wru-SbGJYkm8ep0ez7_Y0nU0BXhwlRna5NBCY5yoUcSSPVV4N1kWWpmz3eA9KZChJ2b6ofwg903lRRobt3ZoNRYHgtqafpk9wlgGVVIfOIf-BMCjYlLYUCmt8MVgPNQ%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter - It's hard to believe that it has been four years since my participation in New Hampshire’s presidential primary. Criss-crossing the Granite State and meeting with voters during more than 100 town hall meetings was among the most memorable experiences of my life and continues to shape me.

A lot has happened since that time. Our nation is even more divided than it was back then and the partisanship we’re seeing in Washington has become far more intense, and the nation is worse as a result.

The 2020 presidential race will certainly be different than four years ago, but it is my hope that every voter participates in the process and ensures that their voice is heard - regardless of which candidate they support.

It's so critical that each of us exercises that right and has a part in shaping the future of our nation.

Having learned so much from the people of New Hampshire and others across the nation, I’ve been committed to keeping my voice active for policies that can drive positive change for our country.

There is more that unites us than divides us. Each of us has a role to play in electing leaders who first look to serve our country over their own political party.

As always, it's up to us.

-John
|
---
**A look back at our time in New Hampshire:**

Friend,

**BIG news: the Indiana Builders Association (IBA) just endorsed Governor Holcomb’s 2020 reelection campaign. This is their FIRST EVER gubernatorial endorsement!**
[ **Join them in endorsing Governor Holcomb** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c507b84b966a47c492248024cc6830e7&_e=UmU9_y15nSp540P5U429pZ1HNctjlsgocribb9KPHNdYtWgAUw1no-xb-qKi_wQ9Fy3sECu56-jufsCqFkqJ7JwhoghWQXHBPXygF3QR7Hm_blxGSxGvyqCFlHhfK9PsR53uGNZvGO17O60XEohTEzjUckOqUsvM8vWaE5tfrg2gD1B_tA9rqKPwfOQmup5McVG4Tg03aDm-FQREC3B2GItiYLbuQgqEUAHiXl2IKAHDhPXoxDBmHLFMnifIsMJ7XJRtkbei-ZWloy02aA32BVruffYlD25lJqJRqOeVWlu0Nnbg-IUkpcegBgtZ1mTh2A2z6aigEUd07LBWiz9JDQ5lD0XYsFo1SLF9oMCRxxEQ2jWbitHGi1SD2A-uLyPbnnmv2Cd-Bq9XVuxTfL2dgOusyppnoVHo2Wme_zrygsY%3D)
This endorsement is huge for our campaign. We’re picking up steam and our 2020 momentum is surging — Hoosiers from all over the state are ready for another four years of Putting People First and the proof is in the pudding.

The IBA is a statewide organization representing builders, remodelers, developers and subcontractors from every single corner of our state that advocates for housing affordability and a positive economic climate.

We’re ecstatic that the IBA recognizes the Governor’s hard work...and is even willing to give him their first ever gubernatorial endorsement.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c507b84b966a47c492248024cc6830e7&_e=UmU9_y15nSp540P5U429pZ1HNctjlsgocribb9KPHNdYtWgAUw1no-xb-qKi_wQ9Fy3sECu56-jufsCqFkqJ7JwhoghWQXHBPXygF3QR7Hm_blxGSxGvyqCFlHhfK9PsR53uGNZvGO17O60XEohTEzjUckOqUsvM8vWaE5tfrg2gD1B_tA9rqKPwfOQmup5McVG4Tg03aDm-FQREC3B2GP9RJ8PV3rOwqFZYMQgmWWOOoxNpmXDOQaodVcG_x4PELwEaIKVIPBXOowGfxhaVrWDB3Jxav_3HQfDJD8-GtaPs3_L09kaTlcQO_c97a6OcsZk7y_yPia7xuPXh8ubyUO5EgYQ0_ToRBPnCSOO8X9WFiEMD8C-ZtgyxBusO7yEmJ-xYI75UKFi6HGVfCEh-zgUArLZbpkcQlz6gHvH6QM0%3D)
[ **Join the IBA in endorsing Governor Holcomb** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c507b84b966a47c492248024cc6830e7&_e=UmU9_y15nSp540P5U429pZ1HNctjlsgocribb9KPHNdYtWgAUw1no-xb-qKi_wQ9Fy3sECu56-jufsCqFkqJ7JwhoghWQXHBPXygF3QR7Hm_blxGSxGvyqCFlHhfK9PsR53uGNZvGO17O60XEohTEzjUckOqUsvM8vWaE5tfrg2gD1B_tA9rqKPwfOQmup5McVG4Tg03aDm-FQREC3B2GCaXrfk2J7SfmFrFhrkDNxIgv2Kea3DPbjCwdAd27PauWvtOffVfhYUVomrI8eKXLQVAAX3egaa6rIMawQ5iJRGKVPDWlim7aQkTudV87ZmtOFdSlzdjLKTADQlqPkuvvbVMVpCwg9HaFCeFSDHcXRCVCODj9z4aIWYUhqeSLXi-ScCDKTKMfR8mqsstoFCIFE4G9b-jOPGWEytXdD4e6f0%3D)
Governor Holcomb is committed to making sure ALL Hoosiers have access to Indiana’s growing economy — ensuring every Hoosier has the opportunity to own a home, build a business or achieve their American Dream right here in Indiana!

**[If you want to join the IBA in endorsing Governor Holcomb’s 2020 re-election campaign, please follow this safe and secure link —> ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c507b84b966a47c492248024cc6830e7&_e=UmU9_y15nSp540P5U429pZ1HNctjlsgocribb9KPHNdYtWgAUw1no-xb-qKi_wQ9Fy3sECu56-jufsCqFkqJ7JwhoghWQXHBPXygF3QR7Hm_blxGSxGvyqCFlHhfK9PsR53uGNZvGO17O60XEohTEzjUckOqUsvM8vWaE5tfrg2gD1B_tA9rqKPwfOQmup5McVG4Tg03aDm-FQREC3B2GAgCl1C0fbyE8Cpo4BbEr-0fFiXs4Mx_gF44S2882ptaRurFKjaNs1Qv8lWK9rIJNTRa4mVZ-7tpY9_JtxffhlJ9dT24CVB_WMBXAcAHONweqRAZOaPoCSimi8XqY3ukDKuABARSdWDCjeCsWZO5bE46lkjce_jLZ8zgEUn7jI7Biy-lm2prWzaDSF4n0a97svbUi1RWkN0alCYMV6MPKEM%3D)**
Thank you,
Holcomb Crew

name: Team Tina
subject: Last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Last night, Donald Trump held a rally in New Hampshire. You won't believe what he did next.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200211-shaheen?refcode=em200211-shaheen&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Last night, Donald Trump held a rally in New Hampshire to fire up his right-wing base where he threw his full support behind his former campaign manager, Corey Lewandowski, to defeat Senator Jeanne Shaheen.

**Make no mistake: If Democrats lose New Hampshire and Minnesota's Senate seats, there goes our chance of flipping the majority in November.**

name: Madison, MJ for Texas
subject: Following the money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Sen. Cornyn has a lot of cash, and a lot of special interests that have spent big to keep him in Washington to do their bidding.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905f2/7f51f7bc/4d2cc626/4ef04f72/2523129203/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter --

Sen. Cornyn has a _lot_ of cash, and a _lot_ of special interests that have spent big to keep him in Washington to do their bidding. I'm breaking it down below so you can see exactly why **[we need your support to build the grassroots campaign it will take to win in Texas this November.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905f2/7f51f7bc/4d2cc626/4ef04f71/2523129203/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkwNCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-febfec?refcode=email_20200211.3nd__904__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
* Over two decades in Washington, Sen. Cornyn has collected **$11,371,336** from corporate PACs.
* The gun lobby has poured **$230,684** into Sen. Cornyn's campaign coffers to make sure he won't take action to protect our communities from gun violence.
* And the pharmaceutical industry has invested big -- **$1,301,722** so far -- to keep Cornyn in office to protect their profits.

So Peter, you can see why we're counting on every single one of you to pitch in to compete!

**MJ isn 't taking a DIME from corporate PACs, because she's going to answer to the people, not the special interests. [That means we need you >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905f2/7f51f7bc/4d2cc626/4ef04f71/2523129203/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkwNCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-febfec?refcode=email_20200211.3nd__904__&amount=10&recurring=true")** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Friend - POLITICO is calling our race one of the biggest House battles in the country, but right now, our opponent, Chip Roy, is raking in tens of thousands from PACs and wealthy lobbyists.
Roy has one of the most anti-choice records in Congress, and GOP leaders and megadonors are lining his campaign coffers to keep him in the House - and continue their attacks on women's reproductive freedoms.
**But we 're up against a crucial FEC reporting deadline and falling short of our goal to raise another $7,000.**
As we head into the election year - and with the future of our democracy at stake - missing this goal is simply not an option. All eyes will be on our race, and this FEC report, to see if we have what it takes to win. That's why Wendy is counting on this team.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: We should end caucuses. Period.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
I'm adding my voice, and I hope you'll join me.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/abolish-caucuses/?utm_source=ema_2020-02-11_abolish-caucuses&source=ema_2020-02-11_abolish-caucuses&utm_campaign=abolish-caucuses&utm_medium=ema&t=3&akid=8032%2E868730%2ETWdztf) Friend, It's high time we end caucuses. They're exclusionary and antithetical to the inclusive democracy our Democratic Party has been trying to build for years. For parents of young children, or people who don't work typical 9-5 jobs, or deployed military, or even just folks who can't make it during that EXACT window to caucus, caucuses exclude them or -- at the very least -- make it very difficult for them to participate. That is not what democracy looks like. That's why Washington state decided to end caucuses for good last year. And that's why it's time for more states to follow. [**I'm calling for an end to caucuses during our primary process because if we're going to build the kind of big tent party that can take on big issues like climate change, we need everyone to be able to participate. And caucuses just can't do that. Add your name to join me in calling on the DNC to end them now.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/abolish-caucuses/?utm_source=ema_2020-02-11_abolish-caucuses&source=ema_2020-02-11_abolish-caucuses&utm_campaign=abolish-caucuses&utm_medium=ema&t=4&akid=8032%2E868730%2ETWdztf) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/abolish-caucuses/?utm_source=ema_2020-02-11_abolish-caucuses&source=ema_2020-02-11_abolish-caucuses&utm_campaign=abolish-caucuses&utm_medium=ema&t=5&akid=8032%2E868730%2ETWdztf)
---
In Washington state, we saw that caucuses were inherently inaccessible for working folks and parents, and that was keeping participation down.
Plus, when we held a primary and a caucus in 2016, we saw three times as many people participate in the primary than the caucus -- and this year, we expect participation to be even higher with only a primary.
Our Democratic leadership in Washington state took notice and listened to citizens and their concerns, which is why we made this change that opened up voting to so many more people. That's what real leadership does, and I hope the DNC does the same.
Look, if we want to take climate action, if we want to see honest progress on gun safety, if we want to build an economy that works for working people, it has to start with a democracy that is inclusive, welcoming, and representative.
**[That's why I'm hoping you'll add your voice to mine to call on the DNC to end caucuses during the presidential nomination process once and for all, to promote REAL democracy: Add your name right now.](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/abolish-caucuses/?utm_source=ema_2020-02-11_abolish-caucuses&source=ema_2020-02-11_abolish-caucuses&utm_campaign=abolish-caucuses&utm_medium=ema&t=6&akid=8032%2E868730%2ETWdztf)**
Very truly yours,
Jay
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/abolish-caucuses/?utm_source=ema_2020-02-11_abolish-caucuses&source=ema_2020-02-11_abolish-caucuses&utm_campaign=abolish-caucuses&utm_medium=ema&t=7&akid=8032%2E868730%2ETWdztf)
---

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Thank you for your incredible support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=7375%2E377263%2EVbbYIB) Yang Gang --

Thank you for your incredible support these past months. You all have uplifted me and inspired me and Evelyn and this campaign at every turn. Your passion and energy. Your donations and hundreds of thousands of hours of calling and volunteering. Your enthusiasm, dedication and commitment.

We have accomplished so much together. We have brought a message of Humanity First and a vision of an economy and society that works for us and our families to millions of our fellow Americans.

We went from a mailing list that started with just my Gmail contact list to receiving donations from over 430,000 people and support from millions more across the country.

One of the things I’m most proud of -- we gave $1,000 a month for a year to 13 families across the country.

We highlighted the real problems in our communities as our economy is being transformed before our eyes by technology and automation. We stood on the debate stage and shifted our national conversation to include the fourth industrial revolution, a topic no one wanted to touch.

Our signature proposal, Universal Basic Income, has become part of the mainstream conversation. We increased the popular support for Universal Basic Income to 66% of Democrats and 72% among voters 18-34.

And without a doubt, we accelerated the eradication of poverty in our society by years, perhaps even generations,

And that is thanks to all of YOU!

Though thousands of voters came out for our campaign tonight in New Hampshire, it is not the outcome we fought so hard for. It is bitterly disappointing for many of us.

But it should not be.

Every single day I’ve had supporters say to me:

“Your campaign helped me out of a depression. Thank you.”

“Working on this campaign has made me a better human being.”

“I met my significant other because of you.”

“Your campaign brought my family together. Your campaign got me excited about politics for the first time.”

These are all things that people have said to me in the past days. I’m incredibly proud of this campaign. We have touched and improved millions of lives and moved this country we love so much in the right direction.

And while there is great work left to be done, I am the MATH guy. And it is clear tonight from the numbers that we are not going to win this race. I am not someone who wants to accept donations and support in a race that we will not win.

And so tonight, I am suspending my campaign for president.

This is not an easy decision. Endings are hard and I’ve always intended to stay in this race until the very end. But I have been convinced that the message of this campaign will not be strengthened by my staying in this race any longer.

Endings are hard. But this is not an ending.

This is a beginning.

This is the starting line. This campaign has awakened something fundamental in this country and ourselves.

We’ve outlasted over a dozen senators, governors, and members of Congress and become the most exciting force in this entire race.

The Yang Gang has fundamentally shifted the direction of this country and transformed our politics, and we are only continuing to grow.

My goal when I first started was always to solve the problems that got Donald Trump elected. And I know in order to do that, I will support whoever is the Democratic nominee. That said, I hope this campaign can be a message, and word of caution, to all of my Democratic colleagues.

Donald Trump is not the cause of all of our problems. He is a symptom. We must cure the disease that got him elected, and in order to do that we must address the real problems that affect our people _and_ offer solutions to actually solve them.

Those solutions are bold, and many think they are crazy. But I hope my campaign has made it a little _less_ crazy to think we can lead our country to eradicate poverty. In fact, five candidates in this field have already supported it or expressed openness to supporting Universal Basic Income.

I stand before you today and say that while we did not win this election, we are just getting started.

This is the beginning.

This movement is the future of American politics.

This movement is the future of the Democratic party.

This wave is just beginning and it will continue to build until we rewrite the rules of this economy to work for us, the people of this country.

Thank you to each and every person who made this campaign possible, I love and appreciate you. Being your candidate has been the privilege of my life. We will continue to do the work and move this country forward.

Thank you all. God bless you. And God bless the United States of America.

-Andrew
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=7375%2E377263%2EVbbYIB) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=7375%2E377263%2EVbbYIB) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

Results are still coming in from across New Hampshire, but right now it's clear that thousands of Granite Staters have said they're ready for big, structural change.

Here's the good news: We're still in the very beginning stages of this primary -- 98% of the delegates for our nomination are still up for grabs, and Americans in every part of our country are going to make their voices heard.

**We have a plan to compete in all 57 states and territories, because this campaign is built to last. And I'm confident that if we all continue to work together, we will win.

[We've laid down the groundwork to last for the long haul, and I'm relying on supporters like you to power forward with me. Can you chip in $2 or anything you can right now to support our grassroots campaign?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ae31/45c30650/1f9614efd/66e2b233/804682061/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItanVuZTIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTzYxRl9SRVNfVk9UX0VfMjAyMDAyMTFfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-june2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO61F_RES_VOT_E_20200211_V1S1_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
At this point in the primary, the question for us Democrats is whether it will be a long, bitter rehash of the same old divides in our party, or whether we can find another way.

**Here's how I see it: If we're going to beat Donald Trump in November, we are going to need huge turnout within our party. And to get that turnout, we will need a nominee that the broadest coalition of our party feels they can get behind.**

I know that we can unite this party and this country by mobilizing people behind ideas that are not only popular with huge majorities of the American people -- but also create big, structural change for our broken government and our rigged economy. We can unite people around a wealth tax on the very richest Americans so we can invest in education for all our children.

And we can unite people around ending the corruption in Washington that has meant stagnant wages, rising costs, and a tighter and tighter squeeze on the middle class.

And the only way we can unite our party and take on the corruption in Washington is if we're not beholden to it. I am one of only two candidates in this race who are not billionaires or supported by Super PACs. And, unlike other candidates, I don't fund my campaign by spending time behind closed doors sucking up to wealthy donors.

**Our movement is powered only by you -- it's powered by the people.

clean_body: Results are still coming in from across New Hampshire, but right now it's clear that thousands of Granite Staters have said they're ready for big, structural change... | | | "" Results are still coming in from across New Hampshire, but right now it's clear that thousands of Granite Staters have said they're ready for big, structural change. Here's the good news: We're still in the very beginning stages of this primary -- 98% of the delegates for our nomination are still up for grabs, and Americans in every part of our country are going to make their voices heard. We have a plan to compete in all 57 states and territories, because this campaign is built to last. And I'm confident that if we all continue to work together, we will win. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" At this point in the primary, the question for us Democrats is whether it will be a long, bitter rehash of the same old divides in our party, or whether we can find another way. Here's how I see it: If we're going to beat Donald Trump in November, we are going to need huge turnout within our party. And to get that turnout, we will need a nominee that the broadest coalition of our party feels they can get behind. I know that we can unite this party and this country by mobilizing people behind ideas that are not only popular with huge majorities of the American people -- but also create big, structural change for our broken government and our rigged economy. We can unite people around a wealth tax on the very richest Americans so we can invest in education for all our children. And we can unite people around ending the corruption in Washington that has meant stagnant wages, rising costs, and a tighter and tighter squeeze on the middle class. And the only way we can unite our party and take on the corruption in Washington is if we're not beholden to it. I am one of only two candidates in this race who are not billionaires or supported by Super PACs. And, unlike other candidates, I don't fund my campaign by spending time behind closed doors sucking up to wealthy donors. Our movement is powered only by you -- it's powered by the people. "" Thank you for being a part of this, Elizabeth "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2020 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Ortt=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Thank You
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| **Dear Friend,**
**First off, I want to give a big thanks to each and every one of you. Although the result of the county Republican committee nomination process did not play out as we had hoped, I am incredibly proud of the effort we put forth. **
**This was not due to a lack of support. On the contrary. It was because so many folks like you - veterans, gun owners, farmers, seniors, middle-class families, churchgoers, small business owners, and workers - that we fought the establishment and nearly pulled off a victory. Your encouragement, time, and energy was truly inspiring.**
**This was always about more than me, it was about service. It was about serving our great country and defending our values. **
**From serving in Afghanistan to defending our southern border, I have always believed in, defended, and fought for the exceptionalism that is our great country and our American values. As mayor of my hometown and State Senator, it’s been an honor to serve and advocate on behalf of Western New Yorkers.**
**Our battle continues and my next mission involves running for re-election to New York’s 62nd Senate District.**
**We need to continue the fight in Albany where our Western and Upstate New York communities have been completely ignored by New York City progressives. **
**Freedom, affordability, and security may be foreign concepts to liberals, but they’re not to me and they’re not to the thousands of Western New Yorkers trying to get by. **
**Since taking office in 2015, I have fought for funding for veterans, local law enforcement, and Western New York schools. I have advocated for tax cuts and regulatory relief for middle-class families, small businesses, and family farms.**
**I will continue to be a staunch opponent of Gov. Cuomo and the liberal policies of New York City Democrats. We must remain steadfast in our defense against policies such as the “Green Light Law” and other attempts by downstate Democrats to undermine federal immigration law. We must continue also to fight for our most vulnerable, protecting the sanctity of life and push back against New York’s new bail reforms, which endanger the law-abiding residents of New York. **
**Once again, thank you. Your support means the world to me and to Meghan - and is something that we will always be thankful for. I hope you’ll join me in this fight and for our next mission. Good luck and God Bless.**
**Faithfully Yours,** **Rob **
---

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Tonight I'm ending my campaign, but I'm not done fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team,

Tonight wasn't our night, but I'll keep fighting for you.

I love our country. I love the idea of democracy. And I want to pass it on to the next generation.

I feel nothing but joy tonight as we conclude this campaign and this chapter.

Thank you from the bottom of my heart. Susan, the girls, and I are incredibly grateful for everything you have done and continue to do.
-Michael

_You can watch Michael 's remarks from Concord, NH, tonight [here](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaa4d/134673f2/3710211f/699708f6/1930832047/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://youtu.be/aTrA5vUhyCA") and read them below._

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaa4d/134673f2/3710211f/699708f6/1930832047/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://youtu.be/aTrA5vUhyCA")
Hello, New Hampshire. Thank you very much for all being here tonight and thank you very much for what you've done for this campaign.

I want to start by thanking Susan and the girls for their unbelievable efforts over this entire campaign. And for the sacrifices that they've made over the last 11 years that I've been in the Senate, and the years before that when I was Superintendent of the Denver Public Schools....

I'd like to thank my national campaign staff who ran through walls all across the country. There were never as many of them as some of the other campaigns, but they were a mighty force to be reckoned with.

I also want to thank my Senate staff for their incredible work and their leadership over the past decade.

There are so many people that I will thank over the coming days, but I wanted to mention tonight my predecessor Gary Hart, who is nothing but a source of inspiration, my friend and mentor Dick Celeste, who came out here and knocked doors for me, my pal James Carville, who I didn't even know, but he endorsed me -- and I don't think anybody will ever be able to forget his contribution to this campaign.

I'd like to thank everybody here tonight who flew across the country to be with us in the last few days. ...

I'd like to thank Will Kanteres and Meryl Levin. We would have been lost without them, and because of their friendship, and because of their leadership and because of their efforts, we were able to introduce ourselves to the state of New Hampshire. And I just can't tell you how much I appreciate it and I think we've made some lifelong friends.

Speaking of New Hampshire, I love you New Hampshire...whether you knew it or not, we were having a great time together. And I've said over and over again how much like Colorado New Hampshire is. It's a complicated political state. It's a swing state. It's a state filled with thoughtful people who take incredibly seriously their responsibilities so seriously that today they were less decided than they were six weeks ago. But they decided tonight.

**And tonight is not going to be our night, but let me say this to New Hampshire, you may see me once again.**

I really want to say that I appreciate the fact that you gave me a chance here, and you're giving all the other candidates a chance. I wish all those candidates well that are going beyond New Hampshire.

**I think it 's fitting for us to end the campaign tonight. But I want to remind you of why I got in this race, why I stayed in this race, why we have to stay in this fight.**

**I love our country. I love America. I love the idea of democracy and I want to make sure that our generation passes this democracy intact -- at least -- if not in better shape, to the next generation of Americans.**

And tonight as we stand here we can't say that we're in very good shape. Our democracy is at risk. The ability for people to work hard and live a middle-class life in this country is at risk. The opportunity for the kids, the students that I used to work for in the Denver Public Schools and kids just like them all across this country, the opportunity for their parents to get them out of poverty is at risk. America's place in the world is at risk tonight. And the rest of the world desperately needs our leadership. As all of you know, our planet is at risk today from climate change. These are huge issues that we have to confront.

**I 'm really proud that together during the course of this campaign, we developed an agenda called the [Real Deal](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaa4d/134673f2/3710211f/699708f5/1930832047/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://michaelbennet.com/RealDeal/") that is the most coherent approach to addressing these issues that we've seen out of any of the campaigns.**

I look forward to carrying that out of New Hampshire and carrying that into the future. What I know about that agenda, because it was written by a team of people who were working very hard to represent a swing state in this country, is that any Democrat in America, from the top of the ticket to the bottom of the ticket, can run on that agenda. I think that's an agenda that can get us the White House and as James Carville would say, 55 seats in the Senate. That's an agenda that's worth fighting for.

So I feel nothing but joy tonight as we conclude this particular campaign and this particular chapter.

I'm going to do absolutely everything I can do as one human being to make sure Donald Trump is a one-term president. I will support the nominee of my party, no matter who it is, to make sure that we defeat Donald Trump. But we can't stop there. As I've said all across this state, and I've said all across the country, it's not just about who is in the White House--we've got to win a majority in the Senate. And I will campaign all over this country to make sure we win that majority.

I want to finish by saying what I've said particularly to college kids in the state... In 20 or 30 years from now, when people look back at this moment and they consider the fact that some time between now and then, 20 or 30 years from now we got the money out of our politics and put the people back in our politics; we've actually began the meaningful work to lead the world in working to address climate change; we rediscovered once again how in this country we can make the economy rise for everybody when it grows, not just for the people at the very top; that we discovered once again how to provide education in this country so we are liberating kids from their economic circumstances, rather than reinforcing the income inequality we have.

When people look back at and ask 'How did that happen? How did they do it?' they're going to look back at this moment. And there's going to be some college campus somewhere where they decided that every single person on that campus who was eligible to vote would cast their vote. And if universities all over the country looked at that and saw it could be done, then it would set a new standard to be a citizen in this republic. If this country starts to vote at 70%, instead of at 50%, there is no issue that we won't be able to address together.

**So I want you to be optimistic tonight. You have to be optimistic. This is in our hands. It is in our hands. As James Baldwin wrote during the height of the Civil Rights movement, this is in our hands, we have no right to assume otherwise.**

Thank you.
---

If this country starts to vote at 70%, instead of at 50%, there is no issue that we won't be able to address together. So I want you to be optimistic tonight. You have to be optimistic. This is in our hands. It is in our hands. As James Baldwin wrote during the height of the Civil Rights movement, this is in our hands, we have no right to assume otherwise. Thank you. | | "" | | Paid for by Bennet for America Contributions or gifts to Bennet for America are not tax deductible.

name: Team Hagerty
subject: #TeamHagerty Releases New Ad, Chance to Meet Nikki Haley
body:
Campaign Updates Straight To Your Inbox

No images? Click here https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-nijhrdk-akrkktjik-u/

February 11, 2020 In Case You Missed It...

#TeamHagerty released a new ad featuring Donald Trump Jr.’s speech on why President Trump needs Bill Hagerty in the United States Senate.

Click the play button to check it out or visit our YouTube channel HERE. [https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCoFmbd_zEYeZQbn6Qag0b-A?view_as=subscriber]

#TeamHagerty is excited to have Ambassador Nikki Haley with us in Tennessee next week. For a chance to win tickets to meet both Haley and Bill Hagerty, click HERE. [https://teamhagerty.ivolunteers.com/Sign/Meet-Nikki-Haley]

#TeamHagerty In The News

Charlotte Kelley: Just Like President Trump, Bill Hagerty Will Deliver On His Promises For Tennesseans [https://teamhagerty.com/covington-leader-kelley-just-like-president-trump-bill-hagerty-will-deliver-on-his-promises-for-tennesseans/]

President Trump and Bill Hagerty have been working for over two years to change the dynamics of global ag trade in an effort to provide the American farmers a fair arena in which to sell our commodities. We are just beginning to see the “fruits of their labor” in recent new global trade policies.

Kenneth Eaton: Letter To The Editor: As US senator, Hagerty would fight socialist agenda [http://www.williamsonherald.com/opinion/letter-to-the-editor-as-us-senator-hagerty-would-fight/article_fe312fd4-3884-11ea-9b19-c37ec864af64.html]

The Democrats running for president would destroy our economy with their socialist takeover of our health care system...That’s why it’s very important that we send a senator to Washington, D.C., who understands how dangerous this is and who will stop the Democrats’ extremely liberal agenda. I believe that representative is Bill Hagerty, a fiscal conservative running for the United States Senate who is endorsed by President Trump.

Be a Part of #TeamHagerty TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY [https://teamhagerty.ivolunteers.com/Surveys/tell-us-why] DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/eoq-november?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=EOM%20Nov%202] VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY [https://teamhagerty.ivolunteers.com/Register/Registration]

The Tennessee Presidential Preference Primary is coming!

Press Highlights

Tennessean: Former U.S. Ambassador to United Nations Nikki Haley to headline fundraiser for Bill Hagerty's U.S. Senate bid [https://www.tennessean.com/story/news/politics/2020/02/06/bill-hagerty-gop-senate-bid-nikki-haley/4669763002/]

Shelbyville Times-Gazette: Hagerty plays up Trump support [https://www.t-g.com/story/2666855.html]

Nashville Post: Hagerty leads the pack in Senate fundraising [https://www.nashvillepost.com/politics/elections/article/21113666/hagerty-leads-the-pack-in-senate-fundraising]

Kingsport Times: GOP Senate hopeful Hagerty says he'll back Trump [https://www.timesnews.net/Politics/2020/01/30/Hagerty-says-he-ll-back-Trump.html?ci=stream&lp=1&p=1]

What They're Saying...

"I am supporting Bill Hagerty for Senate because he will continue fighting for family-owned farms, like mine, to ensure we have the resources necessary to compete on a global scale and win."

-Charlotte Kelley [https://teamhagerty.com/covington-leader-kelley-just-like-president-trump-bill-hagerty-will-deliver-on-his-promises-for-tennesseans/]

"Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"

-President Donald Trump [https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1149779387077791749]

Team Hagerty

P.O. Box 150748

Nashville, TN 37215 Like https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-fb-nijhrdk-akrkktjik-o/ Tweet https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-tw-nijhrdk-akrkktjik-b/ Forward https://hfs.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-akrkktjik-2B93F302-nijhrdk-l-n Preferences https://hfs.updatemyprofile.com/t-nijhrdk-2B93F302-akrkktjik-p | Unsubscribe https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-u-nijhrdk-akrkktjik-x/

name: Bill Olson
subject: Fwd: Bill Olson for Congress 2020 Volunteer Meeting
body:
Bill Olson for Congress 2020
www.billolsonFL.com
407-276-3640

Sent from my iPad
> Just a reminder of our volunteer meeting tonight, hope to see you there! Incumbent Congressman Darren Soto must go!
>
>
> Bill Olson for Congress 2020
> www.billolsonFL.com
> 407-276-3640
>
>
> Sent from my iPad
>
> Begin forwarded message:
>
>
>> **From:** Bill Olson <billolson4fl9th@gmail.com>
> **Date:** February 9, 2020 at 20:35:17 EST
> **To:** Billolson4fl9th@gmail.com
> **Subject:** **Bill Olson for Congress 2020 Volunteer Meeting**
>
>
>>
>
>>
>
>> Bill Olson for Congress 2020 Volunteer Meeting
>>
>
>> Ladies and gentlemen,
>> I spent 27 years as a Senior Noncommissioned Officer in the United States Army. Over the decades I have faced battles and battlefields that span Europe to the Middle East, and beyond. This campaign will be the most important and difficult battle I’ve ever faced. I am treading new ground, transforming from a Soldier, to a Statesman. I can’t do it alone. I need your help, and the help of your friends and family. That help can manifest itself in ways such as volunteer opportunities or campaign contributions, or both. Without YOU—>WE THE PEOPLE, I’m a leader without a following and a representative without the represented. This is our time to stand up to be counted and make a difference.
>>
>
>> Please don’t miss our volunteer meeting to be held this Wednesday, February 12, at 7:30 PM. This will be an opportunity to meet with Bill and explore volunteer opportunities with the campaign. This will be our only opportunity to meet before our very first canvassing event this coming Saturday, February 15th.
>>
>
>> The meeting will be held at:
>>
>
>> [West Osceola Library](http://www.osceolalibrary.org/West-Osceola-Library)
>> 305 Campus Street
>> Celebration, FL 34747
>> at 7:30 pm.
>> (The meeting will be brief, probably about 30 to 45 minutes)
>>
>
>> Please note: I will be setting up Volunteer meetings for all three counties that encompass our ninth district. This will be the first meeting for Osceola County. (But everyone is welcome from across the district) I am actively searching for a local volunteer to host local meetings in both Polk (Winter Haven area) and Orange counties. If you can host an event at your residence please give me a call at 407-276-3640.
>>
>
>> We must defeat Democrat incumbent Darren Soto. This will not be possible unless we all work together. We must all get involved. I volunteered to represent our neighbors, this will be our first opportunity to see if our neighbors are ready to fight! (Symbolically, of course) This is a grassroots effort, let’s show the Democrats that we aren’t playing around!
>> For those folks that are not able to attend in person I will be live streaming it on Facebook.
>>
>
>> Thank you!
>>
>
>> If you have any questions or just want to talk about the campaign please give me a call at 407-276-3640, or email me at this address.
>>
>
>> Bill Olson for Congress 2020
>> www.billolsonFL.com
>> 407-276-3640
>>
>
>> Sent from my iPad

Peter,
Early voting starts TODAY , Wednesday, February 12th, and runs through Tuesday, February 25th. Election Day - SUPER TUESDAY! - is Tuesday, March 3rd. A flat tire, sleeping through an alarm, or a meeting that runs late...life happens, so make your plan to vote EARLY .
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Early%20Voting%20%282%29.png]
Early voting locations and times vary from county to county so contact your local county election commission [https://tnsos.org/elections/election_commissions.php] to find:

&

than

your

3rd,

at

precinct,

you

search
for
here

.
Check your registration [http://tnmap.tn.gov/voterlookup/] and make a plan to vote now.
Problems? Call the TNDP office at 615-327-9779.
Happy voting!
Mary & the TNDP Team

**These Super PACs have targeted me personally and will certainly do so again, given how neck-and-neck polling is in this race.**

Why? Because I’m the only Democrat in this race who has won hard-fought elections back-to-back, with a proven track record of winning over swing voters.

I’m the only candidate who has governed — and governed well.

I’m the only one who understands Georgians outside of Atlanta, with a commitment to reach each and every one of Georgia’s 159 counties.

**And I’m the candidate David Perdue is most afraid of facing in the general election.**

Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are personally invested in this race to protect their chances at re-election and keeping a Republican majority in the Senate. I’m not going to let that happen.

clean_body: | | | | = ** | | Friend, At the most recent public FEC filing, David Perdue reported millions of dollars in cash on hand. He’s accepted millions in corporate PAC donations, is under investigation for taking illegal contributions, and has multiple Super PACs already advertising on his behalf. These Super PACs have targeted me personally and will certainly do so again, given how neck-and-neck polling is in this race. Why? Because I’m the only Democrat in this race who has won hard-fought elections back-to-back, with a proven track record of winning over swing voters. I’m the only candidate who has governed — and governed well. I’m the only one who understands Georgians outside of Atlanta, with a commitment to reach each and every one of Georgia’s 159 counties. And I’m the candidate David Perdue is most afraid of facing in the general election. Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are personally invested in this race to protect their chances at re-election and keeping a Republican majority in the Senate. | Peter,
Avowed socialist Bernie Sanders won the Democrat primary in New Hampshire last night and is beginning to pull away from the rest of the field. Washington Democrats have lost their minds!
Crazy Bernie wants to:

* Open up our borders and give free healthcare to illegal immigrants.
* Ban your private insurance and run our healthcare system like the D.M.V.
* Pass a "Green New Deal" that puts 100,000 New Mexicans out of work and bankrupts our state.

---
| | | [Don't Let Crazy Bernie Destroy America!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OHT0Z1rgmWvTJE60sKssfcqZMNw7RnjEtyWb8Wl2T0RWNPAYHVxJEaqbpxmnPIQzzaJ-yqzK5Ubz2ALloZm0r3s816qfBA3_MKhK35YfFh8A0yj6uwmyOJ9vOH8mCv2NcTtF2paiZgncJA_3LGrkK4gAK4y8EYryD45Zd40OcqtapCaBcMyQAb497lFKuLbN&c=3Y7twk5pN_cPPh-Kw1JBuWJU0_O9JAw96QInKD7rmykIL7PtOZHv1Q==&ch=cSIkPACLsWEuHDUWkxhmsDqPPI1suIGAG2hCyqa0W8_Jh7Bx5-kCiQ==)
---
| We've known this was the Washington Democrats' agenda for years. Bernie is just the first one willing to say it, and the voters are rewarding him accordingly.
---
| | | [Stand Against Socialism](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OHT0Z1rgmWvTJE60sKssfcqZMNw7RnjEtyWb8Wl2T0RWNPAYHVxJEaqbpxmnPIQzzaJ-yqzK5Ubz2ALloZm0r3s816qfBA3_MKhK35YfFh8A0yj6uwmyOJ9vOH8mCv2NcTtF2paiZgncJA_3LGrkK4gAK4y8EYryD45Zd40OcqtapCaBcMyQAb497lFKuLbN&c=3Y7twk5pN_cPPh-Kw1JBuWJU0_O9JAw96QInKD7rmykIL7PtOZHv1Q==&ch=cSIkPACLsWEuHDUWkxhmsDqPPI1suIGAG2hCyqa0W8_Jh7Bx5-kCiQ==)
---
| America was built on capitalism, not socialism. In Congress, I will fight every day to protect our way of life so our children aren't forced to grow up in a socialist country.
If you oppose Sanders' socialist agenda, then [please consider donating $5, $10, $20, or even $50 to help me show New Mexico voters what the Democrat party has become.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OHT0Z1rgmWvTJE60sKssfcqZMNw7RnjEtyWb8Wl2T0RWNPAYHVxJEaqbpxmnPIQzzaJ-yqzK5Ubz2ALloZm0r3s816qfBA3_MKhK35YfFh8A0yj6uwmyOJ9vOH8mCv2NcTtF2paiZgncJA_3LGrkK4gAK4y8EYryD45Zd40OcqtapCaBcMyQAb497lFKuLbN&c=3Y7twk5pN_cPPh-Kw1JBuWJU0_O9JAw96QInKD7rmykIL7PtOZHv1Q==&ch=cSIkPACLsWEuHDUWkxhmsDqPPI1suIGAG2hCyqa0W8_Jh7Bx5-kCiQ==)
Thank you for your support,
---
|

name: Team Booker
subject: Brand new anti-Medicare for All ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
#
Before we face Mitch, we’ll have a competitive primary. And in this primary, there are two competing visions:
1. **One says we need to run to the right to win.** Just yesterday, our primary opponent released a new TV ad trumpeting her strong opposition to Medicare for All and tuition-free college.

2. **The other says we’ll win by running toward our values, not away from them.** We win by motivating and inspiring fellow Kentuckians, not by trying to out-Republican Mitch McConnell. It’s been tried.

**If you believe in that second vision, we need your help.** Our opponent has already raised millions of dollars to plaster the state with ads _against_ progressive ideas. We got a later start in this race, but we can make it up if we run fast now.
[**Can you make a $5 donation right now to help us compete? Your donation today helps us get our strong progressive message out to voters.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14925078/157014295/-1367930000?refcode=em20200212&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzliY2VjOC1iNjRkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bzfHxuM92rECif5px8QXF0zLHKjqBxDhRtJmGJm6_sQ=)
**[Donate $5 to defeat Mitch](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14925083/157014298/-1367930000?refcode=em20200212&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzliY2VjOC1iNjRkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bzfHxuM92rECif5px8QXF0zLHKjqBxDhRtJmGJm6_sQ=)**
The pundits and politicians always make this same mistake. They call Kentucky a “red state.” Nope. We’re not a red state... we’re a disenfranchised state.
Democrats won’t win in Kentucky by portraying themselves as Diet Republicans. That’s not how you motivate someone who has never voted before to hit the polls on November 3rd. You motivate people by exciting them with big ideas.
[**We can inspire that hope in Kentucky, but we need the resources to spread our message. Please add a $5 contribution to help.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14925086/157014302/-1367930000?refcode=em20200212&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzliY2VjOC1iNjRkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bzfHxuM92rECif5px8QXF0zLHKjqBxDhRtJmGJm6_sQ=)
Thank you,

clean_body: Before we face Mitch, we’ll have a competitive primary. And in this primary, there are two competing visions: 1. One says we need to run to the right to win. Just yesterday, our primary opponent released a new TV ad trumpeting her strong opposition to Medicare for All and tuition-free college. 2. The other says we’ll win by running toward our values, not away from them. We win by motivating and inspiring fellow Kentuckians, not by trying to out-Republican Mitch McConnell. It’s been tried. If you believe in that second vision, we need your help. Our opponent has already raised millions of dollars to plaster the state with ads against progressive ideas. We got a later start in this race, but we can make it up if we run fast now. = = The pundits and politicians always make this same mistake. They call Kentucky a “red state.” Nope. We’re not a red state... we’re a disenfranchised state. Democrats won’t win in Kentucky by portraying themselves as Diet Republicans. That’s not how you motivate someone who has never voted before to hit the polls on November 3rd. You motivate people by exciting them with big ideas. = Thank you, Team Booker = | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: Trump's 2021 Budget Attacks West Virginians
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
**TRUMP'S 2021 BUDGET ATTACKS MOST VULNERABLE WEST VIRGINIANS**
_Trump's Budget Continues Republican Attack on Healthcare and Other Vital Programs_

_(Charleston, WV) -- _Trump's 2021 budget shows continued attack on West Virginians who rely on Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security benefits. West Virginians with pre-existing conditions are still fighting a battle against Donald Trump, Patrick Morrisey and the rest of the GOP as they continue to try to strip them of their healthcare protections. Now, Trump is threatening to cut billions of dollars from vital programs that save the lives of many West Virginians, including seniors and children.

"Donald Trump's 2021 budget makes massive cuts to Medicaid, Medicare, Social Security disability programs, and other vital programs that West Virginians rely on to survive," **said Belinda Biafore, WVDP Chair.** "It is dangerous and risks the lives of West Virginians. Sadly, I'm sure West Virginia's Republican delegation in Congress will go right along with it just as they did with Morrisey and Trump's lawsuit to strip nearly 800,000 West Virginians with pre-existing conditions of their healthcare coverage."

* * *

* Trump's 2021 Budget proposes massive cuts to Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security.
* [Wall Street Journal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14926284/157020665/716777936?g=BxHPMjpTVzRd_c6_wnsCQ_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTdlY2VjNi1iOTRkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M2k0BDBAJwPoU1k1LEyaewvyS2Vv0I3fvVBjzZxtIlA=&emci=6239bd92-244c-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=c57ecec6-b94d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=5094937): “The White House proposes to cut spending by $4.4 trillion over a decade. Of that, it targets $2 trillion in savings from mandatory spending programs, including $130 billion from changes to Medicare prescription-drug pricing, $292 billion from safety-net cuts—such as work requirements for Medicaid and food stamps—and $70 billion from tightening eligibility access to disability benefits.”
*Medicaid is crucial in West Virginia to help combat the opioid epidemic and [45% of children in West Virginia who rely on Medicaid for special health care needs ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14926285/157020666/-1076836873?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTdlY2VjNi1iOTRkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M2k0BDBAJwPoU1k1LEyaewvyS2Vv0I3fvVBjzZxtIlA=&emci=6239bd92-244c-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=c57ecec6-b94d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=5094937)
* Trump and GOP are going after SNAP funding, which provides nutrition assistance to roughly 340,000 West Virginia residents annually

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14926286/157020667/-244593981?refcode=homebody&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTdlY2VjNi1iOTRkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M2k0BDBAJwPoU1k1LEyaewvyS2Vv0I3fvVBjzZxtIlA=)

subject: Urgent deadline at midnight, friend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Yd7lS7pmlLpCxSi4qLS1GQHovUxHjxIo-A8VGJbEDz0=/IrMKPU6pLKo9vKctD6xyXO6J76YV92IMcz0sR8OFckY=?refcode=2020212&amount=25&recurring=1)
---
Team,

It's time I introduce myself as Sri's campaign manager -- I'm excited to be a part of this team, not to mention proud of all the incredible work that Sri and the whole team has done to fight to flip this seat and bring progress to Texas' 22nd district!

It goes without saying that I believe that Sri is the best candidate to push for progress for all Texans, and that begins with ensuring that we have all hands on deck to win the primary in just 20 days!

But we have another campaign hurdle tonight, as we face the last major FEC filing deadline before we enter the 48 hour reporting period.

**[Help ensure that we file in the strongest position possible to show the media, pundits, and our opponents that we mean business and we have the grassroots support to back it up!](https://act.myngp.com/el/Yd7lS7pmlLpCxSi4qLS1GQHovUxHjxIo-A8VGJbEDz0=/IrMKPU6pLKo9vKctD6xyXO6J76YV92IMcz0sR8OFckY=?refcode=20200212&amount=25&recurring=1)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Chip in: $22](https://act.myngp.com/el/Yd7lS7pmlLpCxSi4qLS1GQHovUxHjxIo-A8VGJbEDz0=/IrMKPU6pLKo9vKctD6xyXO6J76YV92IMcz0sR8OFckY=?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=20200212)** **[Chip in: $44](https://act.myngp.com/el/Yd7lS7pmlLpCxSi4qLS1GQHovUxHjxIo-A8VGJbEDz0=/IrMKPU6pLKo9vKctD6xyXO6J76YV92IMcz0sR8OFckY=?express_lane=true&amount=44&refcode=20200212)** **[Chip in: $66](https://act.myngp.com/el/Yd7lS7pmlLpCxSi4qLS1GQHovUxHjxIo-A8VGJbEDz0=/IrMKPU6pLKo9vKctD6xyXO6J76YV92IMcz0sR8OFckY=?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=20200212)** **[Chip in: $88](https://act.myngp.com/el/Yd7lS7pmlLpCxSi4qLS1GQHovUxHjxIo-A8VGJbEDz0=/IrMKPU6pLKo9vKctD6xyXO6J76YV92IMcz0sR8OFckY=?express_lane=true&amount=88&refcode=20200212)** **[Or, chip in another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/Yd7lS7pmlLpCxSi4qLS1GQHovUxHjxIo-A8VGJbEDz0=/IrMKPU6pLKo9vKctD6xyXO6J76YV92IMcz0sR8OFckY=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=20200212)** Your contribution will ensure that we can knock every door in Texas' 22nd district and get Sri's record as a progressive leader out to voters. And because Sri doesn't accept corporate PAC money, we rely on your support to flip this district!

**[Help us show that we're running a campaign that has the grassroots support to win with a contribution of any amount before this last major filing deadline!](https://act.myngp.com/el/Yd7lS7pmlLpCxSi4qLS1GQHovUxHjxIo-A8VGJbEDz0=/IrMKPU6pLKo9vKctD6xyXO6J76YV92IMcz0sR8OFckY=?refcode=20200212&amount=25&recurring=1)**

Thank you for being on Team Sri,

Allen Chen

| | |
# The Socialists are Coming...
Let's run to the fight!

Breaking News out of New Hampshire. Bernie Sanders has won Democratic Primary. That means Bernie has been the largest vote-getter in the first 2 states. _**Bernie has convinced Democratic voters that Socialism is the answer!**_

_**America stands for FREEDOM, not Sanders Socialism!**_

As Sanders surges, we must run to the fight to put a stop to his socialism. Will you [donate today](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a2242f5fa2&e=1050d051da) to help us stop the threat of Sanders and the far-left! Anything helps. [$100,$50, or even $10](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=7e0dff8a64&e=1050d051da).

With Democrats up and down the ballot embracing socialism, it's more important than ever that we Take Back the House. President Trump needs reinforcements in D.C. so he can get some actual work done.

[Will you chip in to help send a conservative fighter to stand with President Trump?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=b40d7704f6&e=1050d051da)

_**We need to show the Democrats we will not stand for socialism!**_
---
| [Stand Up Against Socialism](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=229c20bd9c&e=1050d051da "Stand Up Against Socialism")
---
| We need to put a stop to this socialist agenda, and [it is time for Republicans to take back the majority in the House and show Nancy the door.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=6a5d421343&e=1050d051da)

We'd love to have you join our campaign to send Jake LaTurner to Congress as a true conservative who has the backbone to fight socialism.

President Trump needs an army of allies in the House and the Senate to help him keep the momentum he has started and continue to add more jobs, improve trade, secure our borders, and keep America great!

Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner

name: Tina Smith
subject: Amy Klobuchar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200211-amy?refcode=em200211-amy&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend --

Minnesota will be a bellwether for the entire country this November.

As you may remember, Donald Trump came within 1.5 percentage points of winning here in 2016, and he's looking to squeak by this time around to secure a second term. It's our job to stop him.

That's why my good friend Amy Klobuchar and I have teamed up. We're out there every day taking on America's biggest challenges and bringing people together around the issues that matter most. But we'll need your help to win.

**A lot is riding on Minnesota, and any chance Democrats have at victory runs right through this state. Will you split a donation between Amy Klobuchar's presidential campaign and my re-election campaign for U.S. Senate? Let's win up and down the ballot in November.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200211-amy?refcode=em200211-amy&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

Republicans came close to winning our state in 2016 with the help of powerful special interests, but we're not going to let them inch any closer -- not as long as Amy and I can count on this grassroots team to put up a fight.

Every grassroots contribution you give could make the difference between winning and losing. **[Will you donate today?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200211-amy?refcode=em200211-amy&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thanks in advance.

-- Tina

name: Larry P. Arnn
subject: A major announcement
body:
| | | Fellow American,

This month, Hillsdale College will launch a major new online course to set the record straight on American history.

Like all of Hillsdale's online courses, it will be offered free of charge. And I'm inviting you to help make it a success.

As you know, progressives have been rewriting our nation's history, presenting a distorted view of America as essentially unjust--a biased view that is meant to undermine the intelligent patriotism that is so critical to preserving liberty.

I've written to you before about _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project," the most recent example of this anti-American propaganda disguised as history. Its intent is to inject this propaganda--the claim, for example, that America was founded on the idea of slavery rather than that of liberty--into K-12 curricula nationwide.

Given the "1619 Project" and other efforts like it, it is no wonder we see polls suggesting that young Americans are decreasingly patriotic and **increasingly attracted to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty.**

Hillsdale is actively engaging the "progressive" Left on the battlefield of education. It is critical that we cultivate intelligent patriotism among younger Americans if the liberty that has been our nation's hallmark is to be preserved for future generations.

That's why Hillsdale produced its newest free online course, **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope."** We are launching it this month, and we are asking you to help us promote it far and wide--especially to younger Americans.

Taught by leading historian Dr. Wilfred McClay, the course presents an unbiased and comprehensive account of America's past. It will serve effectively to counter efforts like the "1619 Project," and help restore the civic knowledge that leads to informed patriotism and makes constructive self-government possible.

**As someone who understands the importance of education to the preservation of liberty, I need your help now in promoting "The Great American Story" to the audiences who need it most. **

Our goal is to raise $150,000 by midnight on February 12 to launch and promote **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"** as well as continue our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And as you know, Hillsdale accomplishes all of its work while refusing every penny of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans.

Your gift today will help enroll thousands of citizens--especially younger Americans--in **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope."** And it will help Hillsdale with all of its other vital educational outreach.

Will you partner with Hillsdale College in promoting this major new online course in 2020, a critical year for America? I've included a secure link for you to make your best tax-deductible gift below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RT8pAxfs9GZwHOnM3Me19Wi1-5Io7uuspJGfi1AudlT4FEbb1Mn-XBt9OaUdEs-eEp8Y-SvjSwP4e41tIw52EUFez09QnZ9dPA8Ei6eIuUxVGwbvToIciA3k63zzH2fnhAyn5uhF63XFyYpEVAfJn1Nb9WkUKuRN0I9UlyazsMZRHSyJG09U2SG97924SR4bvsQRC5uClQuqFsH3EnqPV8VT8bmaBd7Cy3Lazb3r-JuzYFZBLsjHofUESHydQBMcOnj-iEMXCceKhaIbmFYivxnZ6kjkKHooBLFjeeXegaCXo-VobOTnJImbbhonOOARJdr8PZ-BDK-iJcYsMf78JoSqvlwg8RAgc9MErXm-wHuj9ezwVbaVDDPq_qKpYcTTN6hfU5_Cg_tHymc9ru1UdLpfMRPn3xhmZi1BUF1n-8I=&c=G4QpaI7NfCuEISIseZyInoJcU4UZE0tiTOvSChDMEuWRqJQ1n8VHyQ==&ch=5nJtnt6TjZLMbVLap6iZySu3_Q2HY4vVyvj3aHfXEekDojx33qUjbg==)**

Thank you deeply for helping us promote civic literacy--especially among younger Americans--in the cause of preserving our great American heritage of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

Hillsdale College. All rights reserved.

---
| | Hillsdale College | 33 East College Street, Hillsdale, MI 49242
---

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Peter, please respond today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/fbd0cb306c5c90c5/9138c95f64d923f1c3d6b838967d376c/33013) Peter, **Breaking new poll from the Alabama Daily News**. Jeff Sessions: 31
Tommy Tuberville: 29 This race is in dead heat and we cannot let up for a minute. We remain locked in a neck and neck race for the Republican nomination to take on Trump-hating liberal Doug Jones. _But voters have a clear choice._

As Attorney General, Jeff Sessions abandoned our President when he needed him most... and you may remember that Bradley Byrne demanded that President Trump step down as our Party’s nominee in 2016!

I’m running to fight alongside President Trump to KEEP AMERICA GREAT. That’s why a group of donors I just met with is stepping up in a big way to help. Because we urgently need to raise additional funds for the final push to March 3rd, they’re going to MATCH all online donations this week dollar-for-dollar!

subject: New OpEd: "Democrats Want a Prophet, Not a President"
body:
[ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=5da1c659101f4a60be37d6b294f10be1&_e=XgdLDnnJUkHmz4LBtXMY1kQzL_xIm3rXU9SjLeC5pfR8yNqNCV7FjNQfzpmvIl0os8DivNsuEkZFkmpFBeQoL3eFU4puNbyLUuNIQxCJJx8RKhHDGPmmu0Xh394xUxOzZSYA6ri7q4W-QoEOGb_uc_mreCZz_nWqwNDAzVmFV1cxaAiITa3oo2GDfOn9ek_M-LFtjyG5ZhUIFHC0kzXALn7kVWr_PjMx-z8Hxq2F-XC5hRxOGa1Xhy8Wefw2XL97taWDcSzjsINm2u05xOCxCQ%3D%3D) Have you gotten to read my latest oped? The Democrats have turned religious. Not in the sense that they espouse a belief in an omnipotent and benevolent Creator or eternal and universal moral principles. They are religious in the sense that they hold dogmatic beliefs that are impervious to contradiction by logic, evidence or experience, and cultivate a moral superiority toward unbelievers. Rather than aspirational moonshots, intended to inspire the public and private sectors to work together, Democrats use these impossible goals as rationales for completely restructuring how Americans live, work, commute and even eat. More-radical activists regard eating meat, driving SUVs, having children, flying and using plastic straws as akin to mortal sins. Hope you enjoy the read, Bobby [ CLICK HERE TO READ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=5da1c659101f4a60be37d6b294f10be1&_e=XgdLDnnJUkHmz4LBtXMY1neLBEDT_xX9yiskdeESJxatd9GJpcjO6DxaPXrPsr7l5DHm-R-KFxG5MPHj7GeiWM3lyWaRnCeTDDWVCtQGpYGdWQ1ubRv5zNaoN5CTntUsZdPe6ZJTV-zxC0soIai55yXP0yxYqCrykJcOxtSKL5UA2NBfIPCkS-1CeGgwvETp11WUqAStEf866agTCCJHTG6Tlxmvv1TclzD-mPFWEQ-s40GoD6LgjocdtfwqGV50oSctrvi9Dfk_LZnShybXcK4gbT0fiFwYNEf9diwX16_V_jqyTtA6fOLtqQZtsDMXFXRFfaHL1gk0VM-YwM0pZg%3D%3D) Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by America Next PO Box 320966, Alexandria, VA 22320 [Click here to unsubscribe.](http://mail.americanxt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_s=5da1c659101f4a60be37d6b294f10be1&_t=P1JxeZidLqnw4AasUFAyij0850zDC-YkWkCF6BoD6PfH2PhaPs1OOnwPe_CyqTre18cr6EmH9q2GqvhslLDCKKDm4EdlyutRRdrXgtIrmp7Czd3J8MSPRW2Z2lAeFlegewIHPuO21hRz5DAWhVROd7bFKTI43Nqn04APkDGVp3k%3D)

There's only one way Elizabeth is raising money for this campaign.

She isn't holding fancy fundraisers where you can only get in by writing a big check.

She isn't accepting money from lobbyists or executives of big banks, fossil fuel companies, or big tech companies.

And unlike almost everyone else in this race, she isn't accepting help from outside Super PACs.

This campaign is **only** funded by grassroots donors who chip in $2, $10, or whatever they can.

**And right now, we're in a tight race where every dollar counts. So we're counting on this team to ensure that we have the resources we need to compete in Nevada, South Carolina, and beyond.**

**[If you believe that this nomination should be owned by a grassroots movement-- and not the wealthy and well-connected -- chip in $2, or whatever you can, right now to help power this movement forward.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ae50/45c30650/1f94b2a1f/66e2a54c/1122218038/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItanVuZTIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTzYzRl9FR1JfTkZGX1dfMjAyMDAyMTJfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-june2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO63F_EGR_NFF_W_20200212_V1S1_P")**

clean_body: There's only one way Elizabeth is raising money for this campaign. She isn't holding fancy fundraisers where you can only get in by writing a big check. She isn't accepting money from lobbyists or... | | | "" There's only one way Elizabeth is raising money for this campaign. She isn't holding fancy fundraisers where you can only get in by writing a big check. She isn't accepting money from lobbyists or executives of big banks, fossil fuel companies, or big tech companies. And unlike almost everyone else in this race, she isn't accepting help from outside Super PACs. This campaign is only funded by grassroots donors who chip in $2, $10, or whatever they can. And right now, we're in a tight race where every dollar counts. So we're counting on this team to ensure that we have the resources we need to compete in Nevada, South Carolina, and beyond. name: Finance Director, MJ for Texas
subject: Power Rankings
disclaimer_text: paid for by special interests -- but we need your help to do it!**
body:
Last summer The Washington Post named Texas' Senate seat one of the top ten most likely to flip, and recently the National Journal agreed!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905c7/7f51f7bc/4d21792b/4ef04fb3/3322310569/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | **_National Journal_ Power Rankings:
Texas Senate seat among TOP TEN most likely to flip!** **[**PITCH IN TO HELP MJ
BEAT SEN. CORNYN **](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905c7/7f51f7bc/4d21792b/4ef04fb2/3322310569/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkxMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-febfec?refcode=email_20200212.1nd__911__&amount=10&recurring=true")** Peter --

**Sen. Cornyn 's reelection is seriously at risk.** Last summer _The Washington Post_ named Texas' Senate seat one of the top ten most likely to flip, and recently _The National Journal_ agreed! **[Our last (and most important) FEC filing deadline before the Texas primary is coming up. Can you pitch in to give us the resources we need to make sure MJ is the candidate to take on and defeat Sen. Cornyn?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905c7/7f51f7bc/4d21792b/4ef04fb2/3322310569/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkxMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-febfec?refcode=email_20200212.1nd__911__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Sen. Cornyn knows he's vulnerable. He's stockpiled **_over $12 million_** that he'll use to flood the airwaves with misleading and negative attacks. And special interest groups like the Koch network have already run their own ad campaigns supporting him.

If they thought Sen. Cornyn's seat was safe, they wouldn't be spending all that money in Texas. **We have a historic opportunity to defeat an 18-year incumbent who 's bought and paid for by special interests -- but we need your help to do it!**

**As of now we 're $23,456 short of our $75,000 goal. Will you rush a donation before tonight's midnight deadline to help us keep up the momentum and BEAT Sen. Cornyn?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Taylor Klos, TX Finance Director

name: Monika Johnson-Hostler for Congress
subject: ##Endorsement Press Release##
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d851/7dfbb003/42a6c981/5527c8c3/1143378470/VEsH/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191116_em_experience&recurring=auto&refcode2=header")
---
For Immediate Release: 2/12/2020 Contact: info@monikaforcongress.com **Congressional Black Caucus Endorses Monika Johnson Hostler's Candidacy** The Congressional Black Caucus Political Action Committee (CBCPAC) announced Wednesday morning that they are backing Monika Johnson Hostler's candidacy for North Carolina's newly drawn 2nd Congressional district. This endorsement comes the day before three Congressional Black Caucus members, Congresswoman Terri Sewell (AL), Congresswoman Eddie Bernice Johnson (TX), and Congresswoman Frederica Wilson (FL) are slated to come to district 2 to support Monika's campaign. "It is humbling to have the support of the Congressional Black Caucus PAC, and its members. I look forward to working with the CBCPAC and getting to work for the people of the 2nd district." says Johnson Hostler. "My team and I are excited about the momentum building for us in this race. So far, we are the only campaign to release a platform publicly and tell folks what we believe in. Wake county and residents of district 2 deserve to have a Congresswoman that has the courage to stand up for her convictions." states Benjamin Woods, Monika Johnson Hostler's campaign manager.
###
---
| | | Monika Johnson-Hostler is running for Congress to give the people of North Carolina's 2nd District a representative who will listen, work hard, and stay true to their word, doing what's best for the district. As the District 2 member of the Wake County school board and Executive Director of North Carolina's Coalition Against Sexual Assault, Monika knows how to lead with solutions. For Monika Johnson-Hostler, serving people is about integrity, and that's what she'll bring to Congress. [CONTRIBUTE](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d851/7dfbb003/42a6c981/5527c8c0/1143378470/VEsE/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191116_em_experience&recurring=auto&refcode2=biobox")
---

PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS

Monika for Congress
PO BOX 99092
Raleigh, NC 27624
United States

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. To unsubscribe, go to: https://monika.bsd.net/unsubscribe.

name: Team Hill
subject: BREAKING: Socialism takes New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC | | [](http://links
body:
For years we were promised this would never happen in our country. We were told that socialism would never overtake our nation. Yet **Bernie Sanders** , the New Hampshire primary winner, who helped launch the Congressional campaign of socialist Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and the socialist Green New Deal, **is quickly becoming the head of the Democratic Party**. We can't allow this socialist disease to spread further. name: Sandy Smith
subject: I'm a "True Reformer"!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gp5OKHXzTZNxmng&b=BwO909ytsYs8SB3y4eXtUw)
---
Dear Peter,
President Trump is right about so many things, but he's especially right about illegal immigration.
_This is the issue of our times. If you're not right on this, little else matters._
**That's why I am proud to announce that I've been given the highest rating by Numbers USA, "True Reformer"!**
I am proud to have the highest rating from NumbersUSA for my strong stance on immigration. _We must put Americans and American workers first_.
This is how we are going to grow jobs and see wages increase in Northeastern North Carolina.
**My opponent, G.K. Butterfield, is terrible on immigration. He wants open borders and unlimited illegal immigration, just like Nancy Pelosi.**
_That means he supports all of Pelosi's crazy initiatives!_
**I won't vote anything like Nancy Pelosi, because I love America and I will defend our borders and our workers!**
Butterfield just does whatever "San Fran Nan" tells him to.
__This is our chance to make the Democrats pay! We can take back the House!__
_**I need your help to show the Democrats they will pay the political price for their shenanigans!**_
_If we don't make them pay at the ballot box, they will only get worse and worse._
[Can you help me](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gp5OKHXzTZNxmng&b=BwO909ytsYs8SB3y4eXtUw) beat Butterfield?
[Can you show your support of our Constitution and our President, with the largest contribution you can make?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gp5OKHXzTZNxmng&b=BwO909ytsYs8SB3y4eXtUw)
Strengthening our borders starts here. As always, [I am grateful for your support](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gp5OKHXzTZNxmng&b=BwO909ytsYs8SB3y4eXtUw).
For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gp5OKHXzTZNxmng&b=BwO909ytsYs8SB3y4eXtUw)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gp5OKHXzTZNxmng&b=BwO909ytsYs8SB3y4eXtUw)

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: Zephyr Teachout endorsed our race -- and the NYT called it "the one considered most likely to turn over"
body:
Peter,

When New York Times reporter Vivian Wang wrote that one New York Congressional seat is "perhaps the one considered most likely to turn over," she was talking about our race. And since we first launched this campaign last summer, the incredible outpouring of support has proved her right -- we can win this seat. But only with your help. **[If enough people chip in $15, $10, or $3 today, we can turn a"most likely" into a definitive win!](https://act.myngp.com/el/H8fsCWNncThqk6uwDHcImu-ZjJZU_aJ-qYN-g0CZhcY=/61vR17ypCJCjyyydVioeODZneYle7xDvOVM5nw2ShKQ=)**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
******[Express Donate: $15](https://act.myngp.com/el/H8fsCWNncThqk6uwDHcImu-ZjJZU_aJ-qYN-g0CZhcY=/61vR17ypCJCjyyydVioeODZneYle7xDvOVM5nw2ShKQ=?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=express_lane_15)******
******[Express Donate: $10](https://act.myngp.com/el/H8fsCWNncThqk6uwDHcImu-ZjJZU_aJ-qYN-g0CZhcY=/61vR17ypCJCjyyydVioeODZneYle7xDvOVM5nw2ShKQ=?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10)******

Like Zephyr Teachout -- who endorsed our race and was also endorsed by the Times in 2018 -- anti-machine politics are a centerpiece of my campaign. For a long time, the machine has picked run-of-the-mill politicians who aren't getting anything done. I'm running to restore power to the people, which is why I'm relying on grassroots supporters like you to move this campaign forward. **[By contributing $15, $10, or just $3 today, we'll be well on our way!](https://act.myngp.com/el/H8fsCWNncThqk6uwDHcImu-ZjJZU_aJ-qYN-g0CZhcY=/61vR17ypCJCjyyydVioeODZneYle7xDvOVM5nw2ShKQ=)**

The Times was right to call New York's Congressional races the country's most "potentially consequential battlegrounds" in 2020. And with everything that's riding on this election, I'm relying on supporters like you to step up. **[Are you in?](https://act.myngp.com/el/H8fsCWNncThqk6uwDHcImu-ZjJZU_aJ-qYN-g0CZhcY=/61vR17ypCJCjyyydVioeODZneYle7xDvOVM5nw2ShKQ=)**

Best,
Adem

name: Nolan
subject: Can you believe this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
Team, Did you see the email our team sent out yesterday? Every day, I get another reminder of why I’m in this fight. When I saw the president applauding Scott Perry, I realized just how much is at stake this November. I couldn’t believe that he was congratulating someone who tries to strip health care away from millions, and who is more worried about promoting a far-right agenda than working for the people he was elected to represent.

**Team, Scott Perry and his Washington allies should be ashamed.**
