name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The Trump Administration’s Coronavirus Response Is Protecting Americans
body:
"Since the United States first became aware on Dec. 30 of what has become known as the novel coronavirus, America’s public health officials have..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eba714a96c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **The Trump Administration’s Coronavirus Response Is Protecting Americans**

“The first duty of the federal government is to keep our citizens safe. Since the United States first became aware on Dec. 30 of what has become known as the novel coronavirus, America’s public health officials have closely monitored the situation, worked to understand the virus and taken steps to limit Americans’ exposure to it,” Secretary of State Mike Pompeo and HHS Secretary Alex Azar write in _USA Today_.

“We’ve worked swiftly to screen and safely receive American travelers returning from China, and bar foreign travelers who have recently visited the epicenter of the outbreak.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0e8b170b94&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump is proposing a $900 million increase in education spending to teach skills and trades, in what would be a historic federal infusion into a spending area that’s been stagnant for years.” The President believes in strong career paths “for students as alternatives to a four-year degree,” Jeff Amy reports for [_The Associated Press_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dbd45d67b3&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “The optimism of small businesses remains near an all-time high,” Jeffry Bartash reports. The reason? “Small businesses continue to build on the solid foundation of supportive federal tax policies and a deregulatory environment that allows owners to put an increased focus on operating and growing their businesses,” said NFIB chief economist William Dunkelberg. Read more in [_MarketWatch_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=65c98d847a&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Trump continues to make historic progress in delivering on his promise to bring business-minded reforms to Washington.” The Department of Defense just announced that “it saved $6.5 billion in its 2019 budget by implementing better business practices. Leaders on both sides of the aisle have sought for decades to bring a sense of fiscal responsibility to the Pentagon,” Steve Forbes writes for [Fox Business](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2df8874027&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7108038bfe&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0bd54f8b2e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=4059e9f56b)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:
Voting Begins February 18th!

motionmailapp.com

Good morning Peter,
Early voting is less than one week away.

If we're going to win this election, providing a voice for those living in the 18th Congressional District and upsetting the status quo in our national government, then we're going to need you to turn out and vote.

name: Tom Steyer
subject: Last night in New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Friend — Just as we saw in Iowa last week, last night’s results from New Hampshire show that **the race for the Democratic nomination is wide open.** Until Nevada and South Carolina have the chance to vote, we won’t know which candidates will build a winning coalition to beat Trump. [_**Add your name if you’re with me as we continue in our path towards beating Mr. Trump in November.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=M5l2K6CF-2BTeSi2jZtEX6WDq0JgL4SZ9fws6CW-2B-2BU1P01xbj6EyZD4VLtzX-2BFrvN-2FGr0DazM7bD3Jbxrp4rqlSZ3BrdBUjLAlb1c7iy8vMTCBJjRNTNRDrYaxvZbEt5fA8sykUFS0lkxFaPXNdZ3DpV-2BqaSOb0tx4UR345LOvlk22scTrfMB7rUz1fU7ReMhMwcbmRmMMFUu2LeQFEHG661Xte7Cs4En0sca1ghHH0-2B0-3D0ul3_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjI06VISPfJIPkjxFld-2BrrlsLfWBgSznyC9eEQeuE67ByW7-2F4rW5t238CYEo3QD0YfgTG7hDG2zUwsnyZmlEW0kuKvhvTNjPWsYuzu12XjjM5NcF3ZiJ5EOgKwzKZbow91ngdmPqIA-2F7BlDBEcfRqbxXWxYsGPPtvblXIb2FLli5ZeWFqHKxxl6DDuDckOUhaykNi-2BgZsFmZmxAq-2Bt-2B-2BulmfDVeGSJsi2HfrXOiWO3Hojlu7ykOAB6yBAVEq55umE-2BHDo8mij0hqD0lmNpwPsVuDP3-2BfwapaXYn8fhaz2o4dqMkMGmkziC7Pwfy1hU4Nf4DpRZaX4GCbBS1iITeoP-2BFslg0j-2F5TVe2iV5Xdf4RcKonLG-2B8vGkBqAr-2BtXDFyS-2BiCadrIpsK7otskmL6EyB3R1vTC4z6792ZgXIccte16sQ-3D-3D) The only way Democrats can win is if a broad, diverse coalition turns out to vote. I’ve been fighting at the grassroots to take action alongside communities of color across this country. I fought for clean water in rural communities like Denmark, South Carolina, helped end cash bail in California, and started a community bank with my wife Kat to support businesses owned by women and people of color. **And all of my proposals as a candidate and as president, from tackling the climate crisis to fixing our economy, are fundamentally centered around justice and equity. ** As a Washington outsider, I’ve been fighting against corporations and winning for a decade, and I will continue that in Washington, D.C. I will break the corporate stranglehold of our government and return power to the people. **Our government should work to create prosperity for everyone living in this country, not just the rich and powerful.** Having built a $36 billion global business, I know how to beat Trump on the economy and build a system that works for everyone, not just the rich. What we’re seeing in Nevada and South Carolina is that these messages are resonating. We are building the movement we need to defeat Donald Trump in November. To beat Mr. Trump, we need to expose him as a fraud and failure on the economy, and we need a diverse, national coalition. **Join our movement and add your name if you’re ready to beat Trump.**
---

clean_body: | | | | Friend — Just as we saw in Iowa last week, last night’s results from New Hampshire show that the race for the Democratic nomination is wide open. Until Nevada and South Carolina have the chance to vote, we won’t know which candidates will build a winning coalition to beat Trump. The only way Democrats can win is if a broad, diverse coalition turns out to vote. I’ve been fighting at the grassroots to take action alongside communities of color across this country. I fought for clean water in rural communities like Denmark, South Carolina, helped end cash bail in California, and started a community bank with my wife Kat to support businesses owned by women and people of color. And all of my proposals as a candidate and as president, from tackling the climate crisis to fixing our economy, are fundamentally centered around justice and equity. As a Washington outsider, I’ve been fighting against corporations and winning for a decade, and I will continue that in Washington, D.C. I will break the corporate stranglehold of our government and return power to the people. Our government should work to create prosperity for everyone living in this country, not just the rich and powerful. Having built a $36 billion global business, I know how to beat Trump on the economy and build a system that works for everyone, not just the rich. What we’re seeing in Nevada and South Carolina is that these messages are resonating. We are building the movement we need to defeat Donald Trump in November. To beat Mr. Trump, we need to expose him as a fraud and failure on the economy, and we need a diverse, national coalition. Join our movement and add your name if you’re ready to beat Trump. | —Tom | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! | | I know OH-01 is ready for a change My Republican Congressman Steve Chabot has faced corruption scandals galore over his quarter of a century in Congress. **He 's been accused of nepotism, gotten called out for suspicious campaign finance activity, and had large sums of money mysteriously go "missing" from his campaign coffers.** And when you factor that in with his horrible votes against protecting people with pre-existing conditions, to harm Social Security and Medicare, and against common-sense gun safety legislation, **it 's clear that we can't afford two more years of Chabot.** I know OH-01 is ready for a change -- that's why Chabot had such a close call in 2018. **2020 is the year we send him packing once and for all.** But we can only do that if we hit our $10,000 mid-quarter goal. **I ran for Congress because I 'm sick of watching helplessly as Chabot betrays us at every turn** \-- he cozies up to big banks and pharmaceutical companies, and then lives large on their corporate PAC checks that fund his re-election.
**And when the time comes for him to stand up for the American people, he 's too busy voting in the best interest of his wealthiest donors.**
In fact, he voted against making life saving medication more affordable just a few months ago. **He 's a total disgrace.**
[**It 's about time we have someone working for us in Congress -- will you chip in to my campaign to beat Steve Chabot before our mid-quarter deadline?**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_feb?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200212_MQ1_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=9+-+Itrsquos+about+time+we+have+someone+work&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200212_MQ1_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200212_MQ1_U2_X1")

clean_body: | "" | | I know OH-01 is ready for a change My Republican Congressman Steve Chabot has faced corruption scandals galore over his quarter of a century in Congress. He 's been accused of nepotism, gotten called out for suspicious campaign finance activity, and had large sums of money mysteriously go "missing" from his campaign coffers. And when you factor that in with his horrible votes against protecting people with pre-existing conditions, to harm Social Security and Medicare, and against common-sense gun safety legislation, it 's clear that we can't afford two more years of Chabot. I know OH-01 is ready for a change -- that's why Chabot had such a close call in 2018. 2020 is the year we send him packing once and for all. But we can only do that if we hit our $10,000 mid-quarter goal. "" | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" I ran for Congress because I 'm sick of watching helplessly as Chabot betrays us at every turn \-- he cozies up to big banks and pharmaceutical companies, and then lives large on their corporate PAC checks that fund his re-election. And when the time comes for him to stand up for the American people, he 's too busy voting in the best interest of his wealthiest donors. In fact, he voted against making life saving medication more affordable just a few months ago. He 's a total disgrace. "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Enough is enough, Nikki Foster | | If you'd like to support Nikki Foster for Ohio, you can "" We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Wilmot Collins
subject: Help me protect our beautiful lands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins
body:
I’m deeply disappointed in the current Director of the Bureau of Land Management (BLM). | | | [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=89e0339e30a84856922ecc371db01ce9&_e=rD1470ZZ0UNG2MVpuBb35-K18Lx0E77Wh2Mhm3tRf6ISezHF2LPQsR-REOCCCOYm8C3nutviGqy7cP2huc1biWysXOuORKtuEYkVNTmRXWE5GFYmyh2wRr_vycPf7fqBAFNKOcxC5HZInZnIr-esHyQNUwiENHKHynl1HJKT8Tq2GMuvkrOUyKIwZgnHIcpmW3kRHLqkhOQ3ZCraKIdlv4mUPXEeefDMhZqK39MqyPVy0yAYPmJrU8OFMI8EPO1rz3MIPQ1wRcN83c_5t2OkdHS01p9xH7Fm-DCkVN-FNJfr1jGpWFdexHq6ICxO9Fm7) Folks, **[I need 10,000 of my supporters to stand with me by signing this petition to keep our public lands in public hands. Will you be one of them?](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=89e0339e30a84856922ecc371db01ce9&_e=rD1470ZZ0UNG2MVpuBb35-K18Lx0E77Wh2Mhm3tRf6ISezHF2LPQsR-REOCCCOYm8C3nutviGqy7cP2huc1biWysXOuORKtuEYkVNTmRXWGjtfhVbddsEL2SUVhOxCTCY3ccINaUJNeXyrd2M5puy-4769MOfx6W3axBV91c1c4WTAlieCmpH9kRIhMpZQvPgApC0N1kesCJEF2aIIIxCFo-pj0KNcy5YBUV4pfHdz3SZmFmHU1-jj3OXZV92RFhWcnchdPkkJBOuOsXxQAJcWV5NfwyQCHy43JzG7FRi1uMqy-XiLgb9HkWLocqWj1F)** [ADD YOUR NAME](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=89e0339e30a84856922ecc371db01ce9&_e=rD1470ZZ0UNG2MVpuBb35-K18Lx0E77Wh2Mhm3tRf6ISezHF2LPQsR-REOCCCOYm8C3nutviGqy7cP2huc1biWysXOuORKtuEYkVNTmRXWGr74JM5ZFnXzfJFQDqX_EiFQPLA_4tnzGkfMsqC5-zo-FSlaQc4Ekbtmr-gupHihsR_tTmGukEQhSrKVz0AagTlFqTu1O7omU3CYCKIwBVTpI5I2O1LUtjmFBYzQn24Vf53WlQWuBFSWfpeBgSDykrRBntawwy_vDrHV9LllTgL2uSwgLy4Rm0wuquvUdIy_BlLGkqzpOA0BIhL5tdAGxR) I’m deeply disappointed in the current Director of the Bureau of Land Management (BLM). He’s openly advocated for the selling off of public lands, which not only puts our state’s identity and the lands we love so much in jeopardy but it also puts the survival of numerous native plants and animals at risk as well. As Montanans, we hold our public lands close to our hearts. With towering mountains, grassy plains, powerful rivers, and crystal-clear glacial lakes, our state has a beautiful and unique landscape. But the current Director of the BLM puts all of that in jeopardy. He’s said himself that he would put profits before protecting our natural scenery for generations to come. Selling our beautiful lands to oil or logging companies would be despicable. This puts so many Montanans’ best interests in jeopardy, for this is the land so many use to hike, climb, camp, and fish. **[Will you join me by signing my petition to send the message to Washington that we demand we keep public lands in public hands.](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=89e0339e30a84856922ecc371db01ce9&_e=rD1470ZZ0UNG2MVpuBb35-K18Lx0E77Wh2Mhm3tRf6ISezHF2LPQsR-REOCCCOYm8C3nutviGqy7cP2huc1biWysXOuORKtuEYkVNTmRXWGxVr5R2NU2-O8VPHY-SEu_cXmeYHDoIe1DwO1kPc_1vGhhW6DzZzSHis0zphee4ji9jzZKKVFVgS4h64qsa6qhsiIt-DrJnq8puUmWnvClqx18md2tzp-E3NvN494jnkl7z15aMD1EpCu8cLaaiadkd2d4O-b1BZZXD6TkfwTfNYC8GIWxTxHs-3-mGm_FjWvF0ojZyvHz3D2wzWbYQEQg)** [ADD YOUR NAME](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=89e0339e30a84856922ecc371db01ce9&_e=rD1470ZZ0UNG2MVpuBb35-K18Lx0E77Wh2Mhm3tRf6ISezHF2LPQsR-REOCCCOYm8C3nutviGqy7cP2huc1biWysXOuORKtuEYkVNTmRXWGYDyWxREguZEZVf3JCpZqLauhAEiUSOz90T8_AUQAixu67YcqgUQQIfwGcEistXwzqRLuc41sk-bJ4NCacswkRshKBBTANWK7XArhZfVOUW9oyv18RF5BF9j66qCcBlQd-uPVAgqvC2DCNRY3tIbBJBlv9-ds5bGBFEhG1r5zpyr1HQubIpqkfEi72txrKijt5kAv9RvedLK8O5X91elC-) Thanks for fighting for our public lands, Wilmot Collins

Wilmot Collins is Montana’s first black mayor, a 20+ year military Veteran, a refugee and now, a U.S. Senate candidate. Wilmot will prioritize fighting climate change, making healthcare a human right, economic opportunity, supporting our veterans, improving our public schools and keeping public lands in public hands. [CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=89e0339e30a84856922ecc371db01ce9&_e=rD1470ZZ0UNG2MVpuBb352rZkRKQw-X6DxLBEE5GfgGBcg_wHe9GmiiUC8MQVLcTY1DP6JyCYIQeiTQHGW84BbpVyavnfzYFl6xQvdBcj0JyWjjxD3RXUi1k6iy9dceFbevcBAs5FMO_08o5AvwNY5rwA-usQZ3PFb4w2cp5MpmzEvdS2I5JvKXtk2VsC79u3K06P4y0ADa-BV6ZoU03PT1lZWvMoTay1Vy4KVGGgOCH1MJLEmH3t-UF5tm9RmySPzLAUSGDSTi0TntLCXJrmezUHWaOq0e2EhYeDFK3U2coQwmItLBW8sV6uWJbupmi616GC6UShUscUIISGAVPlCwzHFzC07RoAVV_rWBO4m4iSBGjjHkX9U5c698UR77wofgzr-HKepitbBUXw6xXR5q2EmK822AaO0o89NWYRXSfZqnhHDoAewGdNbAXS6bs0dPOp_dmEUR5CWCLHx6lhe__wrlu_mHAuCZSVgOZm6s%3D)

name: RapidResponse@MarkWarnerVA.com
subject: Add your name: No retaliation against impeachment witnesses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
"Impeachment witnesses ousted amid fears of Trump revenge campaign"
|
---
| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d63e/53d9897e/53699fe6/1c89b601/1816709414/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-vindman")
---
[_Add your name if you agree: government employees should not fear retribution for speaking out against unethical behavior._](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d63e/53d9897e/53699fe6/1c89b601/1816709414/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-vindman")
---
Derek,

Just days after being acquitted, **Donald Trump is seeking revenge** on witnesses who provided damaging information in the impeachment trial. He's already fired Lt. Col. Alexander Vindman _and_ his brother -- who had nothing to do with the impeachment process.

**This is a disgraceful way to treat people who have spent their lives serving our country.** This in no way diminishes the character of Lt. Col. Vindman -- but it speaks volumes about the president's character.

Trump's decision to exact revenge on government employees simply doing their jobs is **unacceptable.** No one should have to fear retribution for shining a light on unethical behavior. Mark continues to speak out about these reckless firings, **but in the meantime, we need to hear from you.**

Government employees should not have to fear retaliation for reporting unethical behavior. **[If you agree, add your name to Mark's petition now >>](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d63e/53d9897e/53699fe6/1c89b601/1816709414/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-vindman")**
**[SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d63e/53d9897e/53699fe6/1c89b601/1816709414/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-vindman")**
Thanks,
Team Warner

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d63e/53d9897e/53699fe6/1c89b600/1816709414/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ3MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200212db__471__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")****

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: A horrible budget proposal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
Yesterday, President Trump revealed his budget for the 2021 fiscal year. As someone who grew up on food stamps, one of the programs he’s trying to slash, I was devastated to see the cuts he proposed. | | |
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3wA/ni0YAA/t.2z7/mkFhBqppSZaewRrPqVbgVg/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwRIc8ctk0G-2B84LyI4ptr1FZgOUwMHXR7BfqLPmsOwPJpfMrFCZvnYopbISW-2FKFBxPXrzsUr0DQbbvJuc0XuZsPUNSA2ssqShQQ1Mn07EF5PwfkePZfA5yHv-2BAlhpFd8HD8txAhaZzqiyQ-2BjJ45PFxIzDakkp-2Bml7-2BtwSkk0Qn82QuRXhnmtGchHxZDiTwXNCconrfrix0a194z7FJcYrebp3TQQovbNVZQ6tru3LEpeibh2mEzISOcPO5yKfc9LlQ/T3IH)
Friend, **** **** **** This week, President Trump revealed his budget for the 2021 fiscal year. As someone who grew up on food stamps, one of the programs he’s trying to slash, I was devastated to see the cuts he proposed.
In his $4.8 trillion budget proposal, he has managed to slash:
1\. $182 billion from SNAP 2\. $170 billion from student loan programs 3\. $500 billion from Medicare 4\. $900 billion from Medicaid 5\. Over 25% of the Environmental Protection Agency’s funding
And the list goes on.
The consequences of this budget are personal for me. I know what it’s like to rely on programs like SNAP. I know what it’s like to struggle to pay off student debt. And I know what it’s like to be born into a generation that stands to be devastated by climate change.
For almost four years now, we have seen this President unleash vicious attacks on working people, and this budget is just another example. The proposed cuts to programs like SNAP and to agencies like the EPA are devastating to American families.
I know that this isn’t normal, and I also know that we have the power to change it. When I’m in Congress, I will work to protect and grow the programs that Trump is trying to take down. **_[Can you make a donation today to get us across the finish line and elect someone who will always fight for the programs working families so desperately need?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3wA/ni0YAA/t.2z7/mkFhBqppSZaewRrPqVbgVg/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNK8dDcuN9jV9Z0FZvGxVkg3NG3-2B9afVXgOup6iNzxmV5tXgZ1iNiRneDSBWbEU-2BFiErj9yvaOr1BX-2FhhJoVrKcZ7pqBtSjnNPw3AsU-2FFzjMoflWWCim8kRkEoe0rO7m3gOXaNpafptpkrPV6oHTHWeJUNZJc6pjy5GbU9JXB76e9aFKo2Zjou-2FbWzVxZE8gzGbdi1OVT-2BXOnxCzk3yh89cpYAQ-2FlBEafDBFQTvYX-2BqRpg-3D-3D/Chqt)_**

Friend, **Early voting starts NEXT WEEK!** This Saturday, we are making another strong push to reach voters before polls open by organizing another blockwalk. We need YOU! Can you make it?
**Saturday, February 15th, 2020** 9:30 AM **Roots Coffeehouse** 9101 TX-26 North Richland Hills, TX 76180 If you've never blockwalked before, don't worry! We will provide you with all the materials and training you will need. Let us know you are coming by RSVPing on [Facebook](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/A0zw5kYG763HYm1aN892892Lhu5Q/bxwWLOY3tDriE892li8hNpBw) or [shooting us an email](mailto:cody@putnamfortexas.com). If you can't make it, but would like to knock doors in your own neighborhood at any time, or have any other questions, please email [cody@putnamfortexas.com](mailto:cody@putnamfortexas.com). We hope to see you Saturday! \- Team Putnam

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = In the coming days and weeks we are going to be block walking, talking to voters, and spreading Elisa’s message. We are excited for all that’s to come, and we’re excited to have you on our team. =** Let’s do this, Team Cardnell P.S. If you have already given for this deadline, we're truly appreciate your support! Do you follow us on and ? Join us there to see more campaign updates! = Days until the Texas Primary Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress Elisa Cardnell for Congress PO Box 667253 Houston, TX 77266 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Where I Stand
body:
A Detailed Plan Forward

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/where-i-stand?e=41f8e27552)
Dear Friend,

When I started out in business, I needed a loan to build my first restaurant. The bank wanted a business plan to show that I had thought things through. Mere talking points weren’t enough.

Voters should expect the same from candidates for office.

I have just released a detailed discussion of numerous issues across more than a dozen categories. From health care, rural revitalization, and threats to our food supply; to agriculture, national security, and immigration; to valuing life, and protecting our American freedoms; to judicial reform, stopping the debt, term limits, ethics reform, and more; I offer a comprehensive platform for your consideration.

The political class has told me that offering more than the bare minimum is asking for scrutiny and criticism. I hope so.

I believe in my principles and am ready to defend them. I want to have the discussions, the honest arguments, and the testing of ideas to craft the best possible solutions. My competitors claim the way forward for our nation can fit on a bumper sticker or a 30 second soundbite. I think we all know better.

So, grab a cup of coffee and join me in this discussion.

My “priorities” link is designed to be user friendly. You can skim a summary or jump into the details. Just click a topic of interest, view the summary highlights or click on the summary text in the red banners to reveal a full discussion of that particular issue.

If you like what you see, please consider supporting our effort with a contribution or lending your talents as a member of our campaign team.

VIEW DAVE'S PRIORITIES (https://lindstromforsenate.com/daves-priorities/?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=e5b3dd6bda-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_12_05_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-e5b3dd6bda-180644441)
DONATE TODAY (https://secure.anedot.com/lindstrom-for-senate/donate?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=e5b3dd6bda-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_12_05_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-e5b3dd6bda-180644441)
JOIN THE TEAM (https://lindstromforsenate.com/volunteer/?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=e5b3dd6bda-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_12_05_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-e5b3dd6bda-180644441)

Thank you again for standing with me as we take a stand together for our families and our nation!

Dave

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: The best shot we have!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks -- When Trump announced his plans to visit Colorado to campaign for our opponent, this incredible grassroots team stepped up like never before, and our online fundraising numbers _soared_. **But in the last couple of days, our grassroots donations have slowed.** Now look, I'm not in a panic. But it does put us in danger of falling short on our goal when Trump and McConnell's dark money donor network is poised to ramp up their nasty attacks on Democratic candidates like me. Political insiders say our campaign is the best shot Democrats have at flipping a Republican-held Senate seat. We have to keep up our momentum and hit our benchmarks if we're going to win this thing: **So, I 'm personally asking you to make a donation to our grassroots campaign before our mid-quarter deadline on Saturday to help us take on Trump and McConnell and pick up a critical Senate seat for our party in November:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200212-slow?refcode=em-200212-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

body:

| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y21LmuEK1nXW1HtzaRrbvxn6tVWDn-C9C0iVvB6_tSD1g87R4vDbgr_HmBaMJphWTlbeIunZbCdIuEiV3FrBntmbsKF0JJfPgDfl5Z_ouNK-Lg620Dl81aLiEqsNyk5394Q3IwPF5InafWSpi4l1SSJR1JpAKChxwWgmekdkzlHVckFIOV7RmA==&c=S7vn5wAebWpzH4r3v6UCRZqEzBBxJDFfPlzqIZ3k-snEcO8aeMDqlQ==&ch=Ou4eNXWHgelnL5xKhSmhd_zyHnbtH0dMSPClgyz3VmzRaiaV2MedLg==)

| Patriot,
2020 is going to be a critical year for America.
The radical, far-left Democrats have fully embraced socialism and want to turn our country into a socialist safe-haven. They will raise your taxes without blinking an eye in order to pay for their handouts. We need to beat back socialism before it's too late, and Matt will be on the front lines fighting.

| The Democrat Party has gone all-in on socialism. They want the government to control our lives. Their proposals like Medicare-for-all will wreak havoc on our economy, not to mention the massive amount of waste and fraud that will follow.
We can't let America turn into a socialist nation. If we don't flip the House and reelect President Trump in 2020, we could be headed for trouble.
We are asking you to chip in now and tell the radical Democrats that [AMERICA WILL NEVER BE A SOCIALIST COUNTRY](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y21LmuEK1nXW1HtzaRrbvxn6tVWDn-C9C0iVvB6_tSD1g87R4vDbgr_HmBaMJphWTlbeIunZbCdIuEiV3FrBntmbsKF0JJfPgDfl5Z_ouNK-Lg620Dl81aLiEqsNyk5394Q3IwPF5InafWSpi4l1SSJR1JpAKChxwWgmekdkzlHVckFIOV7RmA==&c=S7vn5wAebWpzH4r3v6UCRZqEzBBxJDFfPlzqIZ3k-snEcO8aeMDqlQ==&ch=Ou4eNXWHgelnL5xKhSmhd_zyHnbtH0dMSPClgyz3VmzRaiaV2MedLg==)

| It's time to fight back.

God bless America,

name: Cory Booker
subject: If there was ever a time to get off the sidelines, this is it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | |
---
| This is important. Team, Yesterday was the first-in-the-nation New Hampshire primary. As we look back on one of the most critical nominating contests in this process, I have an ask for you. At this point in the primary, the race is still very uncertain. And unfortunately, the attacks are starting to escalate both among candidates and their supporters -- pushing us further away from the unity our party will need to win back the White House. During my own presidential campaign, I often spoke about the importance of joining together in common cause -- because we can't go into this fight divided. The stakes are too high to repeat the same mistakes that hurt us back in 2016. **[I'm asking you to please join me right now in taking a pledge to support the Democratic nominee in their fight against President Trump. Add your name if you'll vote for our party's candidate regardless of who wins this primary.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/support-the-democratic-nominee?source=em_pet_20200212_CB_20200212-pet-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** We saw what happened in 2016 when large parts of the Democratic base stayed at home on Election Day -- ultimately resulting in razor-thin losses in key battleground states like Pennsylvania, Michigan, and Wisconsin. No matter who comes out of this primary as our nominee, we need to have their back -- by voting, volunteering, donating, and committing to do everything we can to win in November. I'll be eager to support whoever we declare as our nominee at the Democratic National Convention this July. **And you better believe that I 'm going to do everything in my power to help that person beat Trump.** **[Let us not be divided in the battle to defeat the most dangerous president in modern times. I hope you'll take this pledge to support our eventual Democratic nominee.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/support-the-democratic-nominee?source=em_pet_20200212_CB_20200212-pet-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Democracy isn't a spectator sport. If there was ever a time to get off the sidelines, this is it. The nightmare we're living in demands our collective action. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/support-the-democratic-nominee?source=em_pet_20200212_CB_20200212-pet-CB-EM1-actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate.
---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fbb/5fca0d19/7a1d56cd/291d0ccd/3219124553/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fbb/5fca0d19/7a1d56cd/291d0ccc/3219124553/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fbb/5fca0d19/7a1d56cd/291d0ccb/3219124553/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fbb/5fca0d19/7a1d56cd/291d0cca/3219124553/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/unsubscribe").

name: Warren for President
subject: Let's face it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Elizabeth has only taken the first few steps of a marathon. The Iowa caucuses and New Hampshire primary decide less than 2% of the delegates. Today, we start fighting even harder for the next 98%... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ae6b/45c30650/1f93e9dbd/66e2ac56/1911557520/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Let's face it: Last night didn't go the way we wanted it to go.

We were hoping for a better result in New Hampshire, and a lot of volunteers and grassroots supporters fought really hard to make it happen.

It hurts to care so much, work so hard, and still fall a little short.

So it's okay to take a moment and feel that pain, or process that disappointment.

Take a walk around the block, eat an extra piece of chocolate, hug your pet, adopt a pet, watch videos of cats and dogs who are friends, call a friend -- whatever works.

But once you've let it all out, take a deep breath, square your shoulders, and make a plan -- a plan to fight back and win. A plan to help make sure that we won't have to feel this way again.

**[There are 55 races left to go in states and territories, and we need to raise real resources to compete as fiercely as we can. Please chip in $2 or whatever you can.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ae6b/45c30650/1f93e9dbd/66e2ac59/1911557520/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItanVuZTIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTzY0Rl9FR1JfR1JNX1BfMjAyMDAyMTJfVjFTMV9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-june2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO64F_EGR_GRM_P_20200212_V1S1_P_T1")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

clean_body: Elizabeth has only taken the first few steps of a marathon. The Iowa caucuses and New Hampshire primary decide less than 2% of the delegates. Today, we start fighting even harder for the next 98%... | | | "" Let's face it: Last night didn't go the way we wanted it to go. We were hoping for a better result in New Hampshire, and a lot of volunteers and grassroots supporters fought really hard to make it happen. It hurts to care so much, work so hard, and still fall a little short. So it's okay to take a moment and feel that pain, or process that disappointment. Take a walk around the block, eat an extra piece of chocolate, hug your pet, adopt a pet, watch videos of cats and dogs who are friends, call a friend -- whatever works. But once you've let it all out, take a deep breath, square your shoulders, and make a plan -- a plan to fight back and win. A plan to help make sure that we won't have to feel this way again. name: Team Collins
subject: 💥Hypocrisy Alert💥
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
Sara Gideon has released yet another misleading ad to folks across Maine. This time, she is trying to take credit for Republican tax relief -- a tax cut that the Democrats opposed.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDE3Njg3NTkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMTA2MjMxMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=NDE3Njg3NTkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMTA2MjMxMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_****_
Peter,
Sara Gideon has released yet another misleading ad to folks across Maine. This time, **she is trying to take credit for Republican tax relief -- a tax cut that _the Democrats opposed_.**
_**Here is the hypocrisy:**_ the money Gideon is referencing will come from a fund that Republicans set up in 2012 as part of an income tax relief system.
**Gideon is simply renaming a benefit Republicans created for Maine -- and trying to take credit for it.**
[**Contribute just $5, $10, $15, or $25 dollars to show Sara we won 't fall for this.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDE3Njg3NTkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMTA2MjMxMQS2&mt=1&rt=0) Maine deserves better!
[**Donate to Susan 's campaign today and show Sara and her far left allies that misleading Mainers will not work.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDE3Njg3NTkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMTA2MjMxMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
\- Team Collins

Peter, when I was in Congress, I worked closely with President Trump to deliver real results for the people of Upstate New York. With his support, I was able to deliver historic tax reform, dramatically reduce burdensome and unnecessary regulations, provide increased funding to Upstate New York’s military assets, and so much more.

Through all of the opposition, the partisan witch hunt, and the obstruction, President Trump has kept his promises and improved the lives of Upstate New Yorkers. Now, I want to get back to working alongside him to build on what we’ve started.

body:
|

| | Hi Peter,

I'm checking in one more time before our last FEC deadline before the primary hits at midnight. As of fifteen minutes ago, we're still $3,668 short of our goal.

If just _one_ of every five people receiving this email gave $8 before midnight, we would blast through this goal. So I'm asking you Peter: **[Will you be one of those few people we need to help us hit this hugely important goal?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905c3/7f51f7bc/4d25fe7f/4ef1b151/610649757/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkxNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-febfec?refcode=email_20200212.3nd__915__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Here's a personalized link you can use so your donation counts right away: **[https://www.mjfortexas.com/preprimary/Peter](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905c3/7f51f7bc/4d25fe7f/4ef1b151/610649757/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkxNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-febfec?refcode=email_20200212.3nd__915__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Valentine’s Day is just around the corner and love is in the air in Indiana. Every year, Valentine’s brings romance, flowers, and yes, chocolates and candy, to the Hoosier State. That’s why Eric wanted to put a sweet and sugary twist on his One Indiana by sharing some of his favorite places to get candy for Indiana’s First Lady (and for himself!). Check out his list of the best places to get your sugar fix in Indiana! [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=3abd7893a135406f885937a0c37269be&_e=rp_AXj8HYFauVN0M0omjg3ltOsushd4LKiXYx0NebyZ7GR7xijIv_CWkpkJpKse9ilYVcrOqyGmrbdxkRsi1LnlPwJsVrBHoqBtfk0dVyqgZQtb8_FJscSQnStYCeLwGQm4R-VSWoRiFT0TlnB6kE3bVzg9sqENekvUnbkaxBB1mU3v5jVkTwJMcljWGmPWl_0b6MLU8ImzzqKfRBq0RnaI60zsS_qM6ipSjwB2MGSDLTkjlWcMDtclanYdSmoYKAtXY5qeTT8m_ofv_Lb6HnT5f3LyuPcoofhACOvkbat0TJsxfqj1JbaZjQswRV4MJPhUTui6dTOgeiWlppHN7yDy4dc4zMcyNMnkyDqZnlreMkJb8qHR-6s4n5poWcvcZ9pj3SORb7UmQE8N-m5CzTrbFGXuqNmE9jevgM2B0SU4%3D)

It’s the only place in America where you can go on a public tour of a gummi manufacturing facility!
* **[Best Chocolate in Town](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=3abd7893a135406f885937a0c37269be&_e=rp_AXj8HYFauVN0M0omjg2Oy4O8dx_W8Q5tN-ZTjossbCzVScG0bJon5wLtabzV9xLrIndhIu9EPA4kt3cfTRbtIicUWmFl0oIBUvv20WPYosuGWEzI8Lvpr7F2nSMdE2E7iOPbul9kfc0c17vvNgAe55qWxfB_X6LkvYYGzbTnmKVlt7YXw0nYIStfL-7hlLXWIjVrz35_bOPOXfCc0BsVDd0MilL90m6or1rDC7lPFUTruLva8lml2OgoVYbgS8XHwhidfbn3l6qn8sL7mwWSOyHlqBthAeFJZoNkTP67ywnolTcaTtt5kFU0pxBiTW1IvIAd2_GG9RI3Pe4dOB0nJf9k2lpYnVGxE1T6K2nE4uw2mzv9Kx8kblV9ZG6jGseoGWMyEdletpQmai2oBXQ%3D%3D)** \- Indy. Their slogan says it all - “Hand Made. Heart Felt.”
* [**Charlie’s Caramel and Candy Shop** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=3abd7893a135406f885937a0c37269be&_e=rp_AXj8HYFauVN0M0omjg8pnkXhJSGc_vZfVr3vz4X0ui_aI55clWnYJsG7jv5pEQbT70EepDdvLfV7T3fnE6GE9oI2os13ADW-W_ls3Kvm7yC2y2zFFme4CvOjjOxTUI6lWBw9rRWGli7nHL6YFKPD83Yykq_i_uCKkiuZ3U0o20NY-CgHOe2htO3R2rlulRl50U8DEdur1SH0cC3VEvZdkV7NMLM44CjGLK42oFVSW_XVcYLeRGSxYC8iQb078NBUUj8PLgNavlBU-CTzbeq1NL5dmA4WBzrl8tu7VCYJwUv4fwzYxOweoTPsSzKWkQ2jTmn6EEpi9Iop5wl92FrTjbTgvUGT1z7E2ssKhGo3qJRh6PLprABPQC-unUQinOwEwhnIev6JSUQh8aVERZQ%3D%3D)\- Vincennes, IN. Charlie’s has been serving Hoosiers with sweet tooths for 58 years.
* **[DeBrand Fine Chocolate](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=3abd7893a135406f885937a0c37269be&_e=rp_AXj8HYFauVN0M0omjgx4TfFUf1JwjteLyrFkr4l5_IcV_RNVfYmy_qEHwjdgweVmhB9kcgFMLDm9XONtPnKfvp-191sAvnbz6SJaRNjR2KryoZjHjmHxyTdF_oIz0GvKmhAPYJMNHIsswUKaxY3r_sByED88vRREolQ-81G6-HxTzmcHcpe7zdyZEB437UOmxsfD63E2yIfvwXwU-HO-FGgBDyw34nBOV_IivwOFoRALTRJJuWMmYi4kMMMbVmSPqZP7VO0SvVTo4aRM-yxxGGEVhahUetUWWHkmt7SaLciuycR6Wosn7KJgCYaSCQpJwCpEcD7Z0aXZHDVRT4zBaodzdf-ODU_0mxVVd4VIsiXJqOtG0ekA5jUtiFPdH) **_- _Fort Wayne (with a shop in Indianapolis). If you can’t get enough chocolate in your life, you’ll love DeBrand _. _
* **[Donaldson’s Finer Chocolates](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=3abd7893a135406f885937a0c37269be&_e=IfKu8Udq4lsLQU-kXRNyUA-E69p9lTuoyRevQdvh0cBx8q3m6X1ll8raAKzMKa-HQKhc5Y8evsYxD1ozEJRhztF2u7ypnAfIJHTaoWyYLtE51GeK_Pk5aRMnLnoRhk9MlHkVwtzWorB2AwOvxMiEeOQeNU7o_bGFiMyDOXtn8UG2klQRUYAKaaJ9T9zNMH5SpgNH1ln8EEUrBHsGWwwP9hCD7_oeu3muMwB7hMj_-TSjV6abqfH567w9n9LybAqrViwgvPcMhsIYKxVhAvOeUM2jq3wI9OOFCwFEPJ452KHL_5HsSSUJib3iYsXh9LZbK7uclLRv5eFQ12rwFiK4rY_tnOAz1B-bs4krF8Ul7DxIWRGXfotTtXB135woYI2gypiSu0y1Q9ySSvxHjD3cqg%3D%3D)** \- Lebanon, IN. 50 years of chocolates “made the old-fashioned way.” It doesn’t get much better than that!
* **[Martinsville Candy Kitchen](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=3abd7893a135406f885937a0c37269be&_e=rp_AXj8HYFauVN0M0omjg6X44sZ0yLUaUQgdP9fH3pnZkG9Z5-0ouD5ejEIiyy8UGSPnm2RQlizNPajmfPsDmEqfNYKWmFcLJBIn-RMMhlDSbW6KF6fcxg21wGMA6RNhahjU2eif-Vn0t30-uKGIF8tN7xm94aEdXoYecf3BKKmycjorlbGdTdi_qbbXuY-5pWE9W9u6M48qUnTj_mgb77Jt4KXdKhC7uwTBlbZrRPJbyYgKRukZHK1Oe-ocdReaItmsKYYVFwDmpQrZGSE0i8VIa1Id3L9i-4nQTuh91d2QZEwpAQuwDGiokN4nSnzMxQV1z2aGcwT2aNFDciCr4alOpikmMTF20J8ltX0CR_uWjw5zEZ7weCb2_7Zq75gCOjttSI7m2n3H1Opw9-90S3nJBC969IEmpePRmhGxokVid5uDJyEDiu3PRanTMTqa)** \- Martinsville, IN. You need to try their homemade candy canes — always a fan favorite!
* **[Olympia Candy Kitchen](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=3abd7893a135406f885937a0c37269be&_e=rp_AXj8HYFauVN0M0omjg5MTj42qbt7RqBcGAgZersARY63Rss7mze2Auj55ysNHNiNaMitWR2k4cXCepjvmkPyiyiooYcDiT3TMf6pmFL5QF6VYKqQkS8phUmRhNWAnntCttO2k42mAX1kAM7yl2IvtDyS89OhGxhED_maxYe5KTeYUVzpQaNIReNDCWhrhErB_dHu3AyJS_BPIIlmdbF6BU25_2yZ-u9iD-cFxaahhr7V1xpVuLZHAV6v83ADd5HtxfE2E0H5_pEOFRfLz0tpsjfhvm2B5_TvegClz4JNauuiWlVGNj0LYeRDQG_FK5wX4kNdh4Y2YNg9HWFk2FfNTELUc6d4TCvVafLJUmOf6FWLe58KUua7DRqrqJgukAOdSkFfjvZaKDm3UzwaNyQ%3D%3D)** \- Goshen, IN. “The Sweetest Little Place In Town!”
* **[Schimpff’s Confectionery](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=3abd7893a135406f885937a0c37269be&_e=IfKu8Udq4lsLQU-kXRNyUExXmjSifAceDemg3xT-cNUIa1b4zGXpfBBMugqb4IViqt6nfCmtYT0VAnndnjE0prvI-Z_pCfNRaNDoRKQWSD74DY59NLsgwcQ8vLs_vwMPprDUhY2UeeM5SieUB7F00tHTI8OxxPA6I0zVFpSdtEvW2vW8Ch5-2_8Ehlb9H_Et2HOc0NtcGp7cKOr0v7j8c7A8US8SXJ7SlVIgqqUW6uKJ_2f6A6M_5SAynjZaatMS1PMN7GdSMc65uyM7BcGiMgKsvhqREObY2xVWSBsMQ3dxgO-Sux5jTF5LREz7KjPcoG5ZqFdrjVOoJvalwqcr1jZr2CRRYqfLt41Bl1HEdEGiNkhd0swLcQAnQja-xvXWeOaF8v0_MPw4czc_scuXDg%3D%3D)** \- Jeffersonville, IN. Founded in 1891, Schimpff’s is one of the oldest candy shops in the United States.
* **[The South Bend Chocolate Company](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=3abd7893a135406f885937a0c37269be&_e=rp_AXj8HYFauVN0M0omjg2ZmthdGhyuXunQ3qSgVb80qodUwlJ_z0kQAHAPN7n9Ynuw72mVDuHNoqI1QrioaK74vcUZ3WqGsHA_5Yo0QjOLPQ4QHJQ-8gAvNOguLDL_nkq_eJYWbEaFWF4W5FhE5H28JG8VJ9CGX65H79QwIr1EhxtY83oiWsQzbZL9guqdiQhFpywRcQ--WxLqLQCPIsPnm3hdcWLxsA9msbRgFboNG7BkMZ1whjXPPfBHv0VHboGK0M8CXzQmkpGOEJDcJIAFhjgo8PFApSEzSAgZbNxTBkr5n8yKkOWmbu-oVEt4ArW6ri3yxPC0xoELAki16hgr8lYFQQGaJt97MpTrhVAS5csNlgEOVW6Dxve6dg6bu1iuyex_4CQmq0U0cwDpsiXuG0nm5nNm4rYZ3c5Rnrsw%3D)** \- South Bend (other locations statewide). According to its website, the company got started “under a license from the University of Notre Dame. It's first three products were the Domer, the Rockne and Nuts for ND.”
